programme.title: Joyce Meyer: Enjoying Everyday Life
programme.desc: Are you ready to be encouraged and challenged to reach new levels in God? Would you like to be a more effective Christian in your busy world? Then Joyce Meyer's common sense approach to powerfully living the Christian life is for you.

programme.title: Songs of Praise
programme.desc: Join us for a musical celebration of life and faith as 'Songs of Praise' travels throughout the British Isles and the world presenting soul stirring hymns and touching stories of inspiration.

programme.title: Overcomer
programme.desc: Life changes overnight for Coach Harrison when his basketball team and championship dreams are crushed under the weight of unexpected news. Then he meets an aspiring athlete who's pushing her limits on a journey toward discovery.

programme.title: Praise, Prayer and Preaching
programme.desc: Teaching at Wesley Mission Sydney is the Sunday night experience in the Wesley Theatre. Be part of the weekly service with Rev Keith Garner as he shares with his congregation a message from the bible.

programme.title: New Creation Church
programme.sub-title: Protected By The Blood Of Jesus Pt 1 of 3
programme.desc: Pastor Joseph Prince preaches messages centred on the gospel of the grace of God. His desire is to help believers understand grace and how greatly blessed they are by their heavenly Father.

programme.title: Bible Man
programme.sub-title: Spoiling the Schemes of Luxor Spawndroth pt 2
programme.desc: Miles Peterson had everything: Money, power, fame until he lost it. Then Miles finds the power of God and harnesses that power to become Bibleman.

programme.title: Sea Kids
programme.desc: The Sea Kids will help transform the heart and mind of every child as they learn how to tangibly live out biblical principles and build a strong foundation in Jesus.

programme.title: Ryan Defrates: Secret Agent
programme.desc: Ryan Defrates is a young spy with a whole lot to learn. One day he's paired with a very unlikely partner, his mum. She knows more about shopping than solving crime, but her wisdom somehow seem to save the day.

programme.title: PowerPoint with Jack Graham
programme.desc: PowerPoint Ministries started as a vision of Dr Jack Graham 20 years ago with a vision to glorify God by introducing Jesus Christ as Lord to as many people as possible and to develop them in Christian living.

programme.title: The Kindness Diaries
programme.desc: Adventurer Leon Logothetis travels from Alaska to Argentina relying on the kindness of strangers and surprising unsuspecting good Samaritans with life-changing gifts!

programme.title: When Calls the Heart
programme.desc: Elizabeth and Nathan help Tom out of a tight situation, and the town comes together after a setback. With encouragement from family, Joseph heals an old rift. Gowen counsels Lucas.

programme.title: A Very Tall Man
programme.desc: Gary Hoogvliet, a very tall man, interviews interesting folk, not quite as tall as he, but nevertheless with fascinating and inspiring stories to tell.

programme.title: LIFE Church - Online
programme.desc: Join Senior Pastors Paul and Maree de Jong along with the LIFE Team for their Sunday service experience, pre-recorded from their Central Campus in Auckland, New Zealand.

programme.title: Day of Discovery
programme.desc: This weekly, documentary-style series offers a view of current and historical events, biblical prophecy, and contemporary issues of importance to those of the Christian faith.

programme.title: Joyce Meyer: Enjoying Everyday Life
programme.desc: Are you ready to be encouraged and challenged to reach new levels in God? Would you like to be a more effective Christian in your busy world? Then Joyce Meyer's common sense approach to powerfully living the Christian life is for you.

programme.title: Joel Osteen
programme.desc: Direct from Houston, Texas, join Joel and Victoria Osteen and the team from Lakewood Church, for a session of powerful music and empowering preaching.

programme.title: Songs of Praise
programme.desc: Join us for a musical celebration of life and faith as 'Songs of Praise' travels throughout the British Isles and the world presenting soul stirring hymns and touching stories of inspiration.

programme.title: Overcomer
programme.desc: Life changes overnight for Coach Harrison when his basketball team and championship dreams are crushed under the weight of unexpected news. Then he meets an aspiring athlete who's pushing her limits on a journey toward discovery.

programme.title: Kids Beach Club
programme.desc: Join the Beach Club Kids as they navigate life, explore character lessons, and have a blast playing memorable games while discovering God through the pages of His Word, the Bible.

programme.title: Torchlighters: Heroes of the Faith
programme.desc: John Bunyan spends his days in prison, separated from his family. If he would agree to stop preaching, John could walk out a free man! Why does he choose to stay in jail, and how will he serve his Lord in this place?

programme.title: Ancestors: New Testament
programme.desc: Discover how similar we are to our faith ancestors from the New Testament. These hilarious animations reveal more about Bible heroes, villains, and everyday folks that God selected to do extraordinary things.

programme.title: The Catholic Guy
programme.desc: Bruce Downes is The Catholic Guy. No matter your age, situation or background, be prepared to laugh, learn and listen to what God is trying to say to you. Wherever you matter where you are around the world today, God is never far from you.

programme.title: The Incredible Journey
programme.desc: Acclaimed speaker & TV presenter Gary Kent has produced numerous documentaries on subjects including the Bible, Bible prophecy, world events, historical places & natural health. His passion is to share the good news of Jesus' soon return.

programme.title: Helping Hands
programme.desc: Helping Hands TV celebrates the people making the world a better place. This inspiring and uplifting program facilitates conversations to empower viewers to make a positive impact in their own circles of influence.

programme.title: Hachi: A Dog's Tale
programme.desc: Professor Wilson discovers a lost Akita puppy on his way home. Despite objections from his wife, Hachi endears himself to the family and grows to be Parker's loyal companion.

programme.title: Vindication
programme.desc: Truths are revealed and new alliances are formed to take down the corruption in East Bank.

programme.title: A Moment in History
programme.desc: Join host Seth Udinski as he explores the most pivotal moments in history and the Bible, providing insight into the events that have shaped our world.

programme.title: New Horizons
programme.sub-title: Life Hacks: Pocket tips from the Book of Proverbs Pt6
programme.desc: Marc explores the wisdom of the Book of Proverbs looking at the wisdom that God has provided, so that we can observe it and put it into practice in our day to day lives.

programme.title: New Creation Church
programme.sub-title: Protected By The Blood Of Jesus Pt 2 of 3
programme.desc: Pastor Joseph Prince preaches messages centred on the gospel of the grace of God. His desire is to help believers understand grace and how greatly blessed they are by their heavenly Father.

programme.title: Bible Discovery TV
programme.desc: Hosted by the Hembree family, Bible Discovery TV is a thirty-minute daily devotional show where Rod, Janice, Ryan and Corie walk you through the Word in a way that will forever change how you read, learn and experience the Bible.

programme.title: Elevation Experience
programme.desc: The Elevation Experience with Pastor Steven Furtick features inspirational and challenging messages from Pastor Steven as well as original worship music from Elevation Church in Charlotte, North Carolina.

programme.title: Joyce Meyer: Enjoying Everyday Life
programme.desc: Are you ready to be encouraged and challenged to reach new levels in God? Would you like to be a more effective Christian in your busy world? Then Joyce Meyer's common sense approach to powerfully living the Christian life is for you.

programme.title: My Penguin Friend
programme.desc: A lost penguin rescued from an oil spill transforms the life of a heartbroken fisherman. They soon become unlikely friends, so bonded that even the vast ocean cannot divide them.

programme.title: Cassino in Ischia
programme.desc: Nic Cassino goes to Italy to work with struggling Italian directors on the first-ever "Neo-Realist" action movie in an effort to revitalize his career.

programme.title: Hypnotic
programme.desc: Determined to find his missing daughter, Austin detective Danny Rourke finds himself spiralling down a rabbit hole while investigating a series of reality-bending bank robberies.

programme.title: Watchmen: Chapter II
programme.desc: Former heroes face threats. The Comedian is dead, Dr. Manhattan exiled to Mars, Ozymandias survived an attack and Rorschach is arrested.

programme.title: Depravity
programme.desc: Friends find themselves on a dangerous path as they try to cover up the death of an innocent man.

programme.title: YOLO
programme.desc: After an argument with her younger sister, Le Ying moves out on her own. She meets a boxing trainer and starts boxing.

programme.title: The Watchers
programme.desc: A 28-year-old artist gets stranded in an expansive, untouched forest in western Ireland. Finding shelter, she meets three strangers who are stalked by mysterious creatures every night.

programme.title: MaXXXine
programme.desc: Adult film star and aspiring actress Maxine Minx finally gets her big break. However, as a mysterious killer stalks the starlets of LA, a trail of blood threatens to reveal her sinister past.

programme.title: Speak No Evil
programme.desc: A dream holiday turns into a living nightmare when an American couple and their daughter spend the weekend at a British family's idyllic country estate.

programme.title: The Critic
programme.desc: A powerful London theatre critic lures a struggling actress into a blackmail scheme that has deadly consequences.

programme.title: Good Luck To You, Leo Grande
programme.desc: Retired teacher, Nancy, embarks on a post-marital sexual awakening with sex worker, Leo who draws on all his skills and charm, and together they find a surprising human connection.

programme.title: Anora
programme.desc: Anora, a Brooklyn sex worker, marries an oligarch's son. But when the news reaches Russia, his parents rush to New York to have the marriage annulled, threatening her fairytale.

programme.title: Thelma
programme.desc: When 93-year-old Thelma Post gets duped by a phone scammer pretending to be her grandson, she sets out on a treacherous quest across the city to reclaim what was taken from her.

programme.title: Almost Famous
programme.desc: A coming-of-age story about an aspiring teenage writer who, ignoring the advice of his mother, goes on the road with an almost famous band in the '70s.

programme.title: Meet the Parents
programme.desc: Greg is poised to propose to his girlfriend during a visit to her parents' home. But he needs to ask her father. However, Pam's ex-CIA father takes an immediate dislike to her less-than-truthful beau.

programme.title: Black Hawk Down
programme.desc: The true account of the disastrous US raid to capture a Somali warlord in 1993. When the mission goes wrong, elite forces must fight their way out.

programme.title: The Perfect Storm
programme.desc: Based on a terrifyingly true and tragic story, a fishing crew sail into a disastrous storm when three hurricanes merge, creating mountainous waves.

programme.title: Chicken Run
programme.desc: A smooth-talking rooster crash-lands into a farm and attempts to help a group of chickens escape. With teamwork and a little bit of cluck, the fearless flock plots one last daring attempt for freedom.

programme.title: Bridget Jones's Diary
programme.desc: A busy journalist embarks on a husband-seeking journey towards self-discovery with the help of two imperfect suitors.

programme.title: Zoolander
programme.desc: The misadventures of clueless model Derek Zoolander, who is hired to stop a cartel of political killers posing as male models.

programme.title: Blow
programme.desc: The true story of George Jung, who moved a mountain of cocaine into the USA for Carlos Escobar's Medellin cartel, made $100 million, wound up doing 15 years in jail and blew the lot.

programme.title: Little Nicky
programme.desc: When Satan refuses to retire, two of his heirs leave Hell for New York City to gather enough souls to vote the Prince of Darkness out of office.

programme.title: Reindeer Games
programme.desc: Just released from prison, all Rudy wants is to start a new life with Ashley, the girl of his dreams, but between them and happiness stands her crazy brother and his motley crew of deadly criminals.

programme.title: Black Hawk Down
programme.desc: The true account of the disastrous US raid to capture a Somali warlord in 1993. When the mission goes wrong, elite forces must fight their way out.

programme.title: The Fast and the Furious
programme.desc: An undercover cop infiltrates a street-racing gang led by Dom Toretto, whose fans treat him like a rock star. Dirty money, big-rig hijacking, and high-octane action rev up this thrill ride.

programme.title: Jurassic Park III
programme.desc: A small team embark on a dangerous task, searching through a deserted island inhabited by ferocious dinosaurs.

programme.title: Galaxy Quest
programme.desc: The alumni cast of a cult space TV show have to play their roles as the real thing when an alien race needs their help.

programme.title: Hotel Transylvania
programme.desc: Welcome to the Hotel Transylvania. Dracula, who runs a five-stake resort away from the human world, goes into overprotective mode when a boy discovers the resort and falls for the count's daughter.

programme.title: Home
programme.desc: When a cute alien lands on Earth and finds himself on the run from his own race, he forms an unlikely friendship with a brave little girl who's on a quest of her own.

programme.title: An American Tail
programme.desc: Fievel the mouse travels from Russia to America with his family in the late 1800s to seek freedom from cat persecution.

programme.title: An American Tail: Fievel Goes West
programme.desc: Lured out west by the crafty Cat R. Waul, Fievel joins forces with famed lawdog Wylie Blurp to thwart a sinister plot to transform unsuspecting settlers into ... mouse burgers!

programme.title: Despicable Me 2
programme.desc: Get ready for more Minion madness! Just as Gru has given up being super-bad to be a super-dad, the Anti-Villain League recruits him to track down a new criminal mastermind and save the world.

programme.title: Top Cat Begins
programme.desc: Poor, lonely and living on the streets, Top Cat meets Benny, a naive and good-hearted cat looking for adventure.

programme.title: Spider-Man: Into the Spider-Verse
programme.desc: Brooklyn teen Miles Morales is introduced to the limitless possibilities of the Spider-Verse, where more than one can wear the mask.

programme.title: Smurfs: The Lost Village
programme.desc: A mysterious map sets Smurfette and her friends on a thrilling race through the Forbidden Forest to find a mysterious lost village before the evil wizard Gargamel does.

programme.title: Transformers One
programme.desc: The untold origin story of Optimus Prime and Megatron, better known as sworn enemies, but who once were friends bonded like brothers.

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda
programme.desc: Clumsy and overweight panda, Po, dreams of becoming a kung fu master.

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda 2
programme.desc: Po is now living his dream as The Dragon Warrior. But his new life is threatened by the emergence of a formidable villain, who plans to use a secret weapon to conquer China.

programme.title: The Angry Birds Movie 2
programme.desc: To save their islands, the flightless angry birds and the scheming green piggies take their beef to the next level.

programme.title: Madagascar 3: Europe's Most Wanted
programme.desc: Alex, Marty, Gloria and Melman are still fighting to get home to their beloved Big Apple. Their journey takes them through Europe where they find the perfect cover, a travelling circus.

programme.title: Shrek the Third
programme.desc: Dad-to-be Shrek and his posse embark on a new, trouble-filled adventure, in search of their next king. Another fun family romp.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (2014)
programme.desc: Based on the hit '90s animation, the Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles are back and have teamed up with news reporter April O'Neill to save New York City from the evil Shredder.

programme.title: Puss in Boots
programme.desc: After Puss in Boots was blamed for a bank robbery in San Ricardo, engineered against his wishes by Humpty Dumpty, Puss leaves Humpty to his fate. Now reunited, they try to trust each other again.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible III
programme.desc: Ethan Hunt must bring down a ruthless villain and rescue his fiancee.

programme.title: Battleship
programme.desc: Based on the classic Hasbro naval combat game, this is the story of an international fleet of ships that come across an alien armada while on a naval war games exercise.

programme.title: Robin Hood (2010)
programme.desc: In an age of oppression and shameless tyranny, an outlaw becomes the unlikely hero that saves a nation and inspires generations to fight for freedom.

programme.title: Repo Men
programme.desc: Set in the near future when artificial organs can be bought on credit, it revolves around a man who struggles to make the payments on a heart he has purchased.

programme.title: The Italian Job
programme.desc: The plan was flawless. The execution was perfect. Charlie Croker pulled off the crime of a lifetime.

programme.title: The Mummy: Tomb of the Dragon Emperor
programme.desc: Rick O'Connell returns to combat a long-entombed emperor who threatens to plunge the world into his merciless service, with the chase going from Shanghai to high into the Himalayas.

programme.title: Jack Reacher: Never Go Back
programme.desc: When an Army Major is framed for treason, Reacher discovers she's the target of a massive government conspiracy and risks everything to take down the corrupt organisation.

programme.title: The Dark Knight
programme.desc: A rising criminal mastermind known as The Joker thrusts Gotham into anarchy and forces Batman closer to crossing the fine line between hero and vigilante.

programme.title: Interstellar
programme.desc: As life on Earth grinds to a halt, a team of explorers and astronauts travel through a wormhole and across the galaxy to discover whether mankind has a future among the stars.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible - Ghost Protocol
programme.desc: The IMF is shut down when it's implicated in the bombing of the Kremlin, causing Ethan Hunt and his new team to go rogue to clear their organisation's name.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible - Rogue Nation
programme.desc: Ethan and team take on their most impossible mission yet, eradicating a highly skilled international rogue organisation that is committed to destroying the IMF.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible - Fallout
programme.desc: On a dangerous assignment, Ethan chooses to save his team over completing the mission, allowing nuclear weapons to fall into the wrong hands. The IMF team must stop the fallout.

programme.title: The Hangover Part III
programme.desc: The third and final instalment in the comedy smash hit. This time, there's no wedding. No bachelor party. What could go wrong, right? But when the Wolfpack hits the road, all bets are off.

programme.title: Johnny English
programme.desc: Can a clueless super spy save the day without denting the nation's pride, or his super-cool Aston Martin spy car?

programme.title: Wanderlust
programme.desc: Rattled by sudden unemployment, a Manhattan couple surveys alternative living options, ultimately deciding to experiment with living on a rural commune where free love rules.

programme.title: The Wedding Ringer
programme.desc: A nerdy, introverted groom seeks the services of a company that supplies best men for grooms in need. What ensues is a hilarious wedding charade as they try to pull off the big con.

programme.title: Pitch Perfect
programme.desc: Beca, a freshman at her new college, finds herself muscled into a clique whose only thing in common is how good they sound when they sing together in perfect harmony in this laugh-out-loud comedy.

programme.title: Step Brothers
programme.desc: Two woefully immature men are forced to live as brothers when their parents decide to get hitched.

programme.title: Ted
programme.desc: Family Guy creator Seth MacFarlane brings his brazen humour to the screen when a grown man must deal with the loved teddy bear that came to life from a childhood wish and has refused to leave since.

programme.title: Johnny English Strikes Again
programme.desc: After a cyber-attack reveals the identity of all of the active undercover agents in Britain, Johnny English is forced to come out of retirement to find the mastermind hacker.

programme.title: The Family Fang
programme.desc: When their parents go missing, a pair of siblings return home to investigate whether it's foul play or just another elaborate ruse, but nothing prepares them for what they discover.

programme.title: Hot Fuzz
programme.desc: A big-city cop is reassigned to an idyllic, quiet town. But his dull existence is interrupted by suspicious accidents.

programme.title: Central Intelligence
programme.desc: A mild-mannered accountant whose glory days are behind him, bumps into a formerly nerdy classmate and is pulled into the high-stakes world of international espionage.

programme.title: The Boss
programme.desc: After doing time for insider trading, an entrepreneur wastes no time in devising a winner-take-all plan to rebuild her empire.

programme.title: Pineapple Express
programme.desc: A pothead who sees a crooked cop committing a murder goes on the run with his dealer.

programme.title: Tag
programme.desc: Based on a true story. For one month every year, five highly competitive friends hit the ground running in a no-holds-barred game of tag they've been playing since the first grade.

programme.title: Johnny English Strikes Again
programme.desc: After a cyber-attack reveals the identity of all of the active undercover agents in Britain, Johnny English is forced to come out of retirement to find the mastermind hacker.

programme.title: Burlesque
programme.desc: In this visually stunning musical, a small-town singer moves to the big city for her chance at stardom and becomes enchanted by Burlesque, a glamorous nightclub.

programme.title: The Mirror Has Two Faces
programme.desc: Two best friends agree to an unconventional marriage built on intellectual passion instead of sexual heat. But when then fall in love, they realise they are courting chaos.

programme.title: For Love Of The Game
programme.desc: When a legendary pitcher strikes out with his girlfriend, he has to play the game of his life. The suspense lasts until the last ball is thrown in this heartwarming drama.

programme.title: Sense and Sensibility
programme.desc: Based on Jane Austen's classic novel, this tells of the Dashwood sisters whose chances at marriage seem doomed by their family's sudden loss of fortune.

programme.title: Suddenly 30
programme.desc: With the help of some magic wishing dust, 13-year-old Jenna Rink becomes 30 and gorgeous overnight, with everything she ever wanted, except for the true love she left behind.

programme.title: Bridesmaids
programme.desc: Annie's life is a mess. But when she finds out her lifelong best friend is engaged, she simply must serve as Lillian's maid of honour.

programme.title: Burlesque
programme.desc: In this visually stunning musical, a small-town singer moves to the big city for her chance at stardom and becomes enchanted by Burlesque, a glamorous nightclub.

programme.title: The High Note
programme.desc: Set in the dazzling world of the LA music scene comes the story of Grace Davis, a superstar whose talent, and ego, have reached unbelievable heights.

programme.title: Single White Female
programme.desc: A woman's ad for a female tenant opens the door to unrelenting terror. She takes over her spare room, her boyfriend and her identity.

programme.title: Ladies in Black
programme.desc: Adapted from the novel by Madeleine St John, this is an alluring and tender-hearted comedy drama about the lives of a group of department store employees in 1959 Sydney.

programme.title: Girls Trip
programme.desc: Four lifelong friends travel to New Orleans for the annual Essence Festival. There's enough dancing, drinking, brawling and romancing to make the Big Easy blush.

programme.title: Crazy Rich Asians
programme.desc: Native New Yorker Rachel accompanies her long-time boyfriend Nick to his friend's wedding in Singapore. But she's unprepared to learn a few key details about his life.

programme.title: Hitch
programme.desc: Hitch is a cocky and successful date doctor for the unlucky in love, but when he falls for gossip columnist Sara, he forgets his own rules.

programme.title: Ned Kelly
programme.desc: The story of Australia's most famous outlaw, whose time on the run with his gang ended in the legendary shootout at Glenrowan.

programme.title: The Great Escaper
programme.desc: Bernard Jordan, a World War II veteran, sneaks out of his care home to attend the 70th anniversary commemoration of the D-Day landings in Normandy.

programme.title: Reindeer Games
programme.desc: Just released from prison, all Rudy wants is to start a new life with Ashley, the girl of his dreams, but between them and happiness stands her crazy brother and his motley crew of deadly criminals.

programme.title: Inglourious Basterds
programme.desc: As war rages in Europe, a Nazi-scalping squad of American soldiers, known to their enemy as The Basterds, is on a daring mission to take down the leaders of the Third Reich.

programme.title: The Passenger
programme.desc: Randy is happy fading into the background. But when his co-worker Benson goes on a sudden violent rampage, Randy is forced to face his fears and confront his troubled past in order to survive.

programme.title: Split
programme.desc: Three girls are kidnapped by a man with 23 distinct personalities and they must try to escape before the next one emerges.

programme.title: The Da Vinci Code
programme.desc: A Harvard professor implicated in a murder must unravel an ancient code to expose the greatest conspiracy in history.

programme.title: Ordinary Angels
programme.desc: A struggling hairdresser finds a renewed sense of purpose when she meets a widowed father and his two daughters.

programme.title: Downton Abbey
programme.desc: After six unforgettable seasons, the global phenomenon heads to the big screen for the next chapter of the Crawley family saga.

programme.title: Dear Evan Hansen
programme.desc: In this film adaptation of the Broadway phenomenon, Evan Hansen is an anxious, isolated high-schooler who aches for understanding and belonging amid the chaos and cruelty of the social media age.

programme.title: Eyes Wide Shut
programme.desc: A doctor enters a secret world of sex play that threatens his life and marriage after his wife admits to fantasies about another man.

programme.title: Snatch
programme.desc: Crooked boxing promoters, violent bookies, a Russian gangster, incompetent robbers, and suss jewellers fight over a priceless stolen diamond.

programme.title: The Jackal
programme.desc: An FBI director works with a Russian agent and a jailed terrorist to hunt down the elusive Jackal, a master-of-disguise assassin on a deadly mission.

programme.title: Mercury Rising
programme.desc: An orphaned autistic savant who deciphers a government code in a magazine triggers a national security alarm that makes him an assassin's target.

programme.title: Innerspace
programme.desc: A test pilot is miniaturised in a secret experiment, and accidentally injected into a hapless store clerk.

programme.title: Twister
programme.desc: Thrill-seeking meteorologists are chasing the most destructive tornado in 50 years.

programme.title: Back To The Future III
programme.desc: Marty McFly ends up in the wild west of 1885 to save mad scientist Doc Brown from a crazed gunfighter. It's the final chapter in the time-travelling comedy series.

programme.title: The Great Outdoors
programme.desc: A big-hearted family man's plan for a peaceful getaway at a lakeside resort is ruined when his obnoxious brother-in-law turns up with his weirdo brood.

programme.title: Parenthood
programme.desc: An unforgettable and hilarious portrait of life's most rewarding occupation: Parenthood. The Buckmans are a modern-day family facing the age-old dilemma of trying to raise children the right way.

programme.title: Scarface
programme.desc: The violent Cuban gangster Tony 'Scarface' Montana becomes a cocaine king in Miami. His greed and ego prove his undoing as ruthless rivals plot to take over his drug empire.

programme.title: Houseboat
programme.desc: A widowed man and his three children fall for an Italian woman who joins their floating home as housekeeper. He wins both their love and hers too.

programme.title: The Karate Kid (1984)
programme.desc: A new kid in town who is picked on by bullies learns karate and eastern philosophy from Mr Miyagi, and learns how to fight back.

programme.title: The Karate Kid: Part II
programme.desc: Daniel, now a karate champ, goes to Okinawa with Mr Miyagi, his mentor. Miyagi rekindles an old flame while Daniel finds love, and enemies, of his own.

programme.title: The Karate Kid: Part III
programme.desc: A bad guy from the original Karate Kid plots revenge on young Daniel and his mentor Miyagi after they defeat his karate school and ruin his business.

programme.title: Parenthood
programme.desc: An unforgettable and hilarious portrait of life's most rewarding occupation: Parenthood. The Buckmans are a modern-day family facing the age-old dilemma of trying to raise children the right way.

programme.title: I'll Be Watching
programme.desc: After narrowly escaping the clutches of a deadly stalker, a beautiful young woman flees to a remote town, where she rebuilds her life and finds the man of her dreams.

programme.title: The Night Stalker
programme.desc: An attorney who lived in LA during the Night Stalker's murder spree attempts to clear the name of an inmate who she believes was wrongly accused of the crimes.

programme.title: Road Trip Hostage
programme.desc: A deranged criminal forces a young woman to drive him across the country.

programme.title: V.C. Andrews' All That Glitters
programme.desc: Driven from the Dumas mansion back to her beloved bayou, Ruby is determined to make a secure and happy home for her precious infant daughter, Pearl.

programme.title: From Straight A's to XXX
programme.desc: Miriam Weeks, a freshman at Duke University, is looking to make money to cover tuition and becomes infamously known for starring in online pornography under the pseudonym Belle Knox.

programme.title: Sisters
programme.desc: A reporter who witnesses a brutal murder becomes entangled in a mystery involving conjoined twins who were separated at birth.

programme.title: If There Be Thorns
programme.desc: With Christopher and Cathy Dollanganger living together as man and wife, Cathy's two sons are unaware of the incestuous nature of their parents' relationship.

programme.title: Britney Ever After
programme.desc: The true story of Britney Jean Spears, one of the bestselling teenage music artists of all-time, whose dating life and public emotional breakdowns were the subjects of a worldwide media frenzy.

programme.title: Menendez: Blood Brothers
programme.desc: Erik and Lyle Menendez were educated, nice boys from sunny Beverly Hills, California. So when their parents were found shot dead in their home, no one could figure out why they did it.

programme.title: The Bear Lake Murders
programme.desc: A sheriff teams up with a detective to uncover the truth behind a series of annual deaths in a resort town. Their investigation leads them to believe that a killer is preying on holidaymakers.

programme.title: Oscar Pistorius: Blade Runner Killer
programme.desc: The true story of the sprint runner and his rise to fame as a Paralympian gold medallist. It all shattered one evening when four bullets were fired and his beautiful girlfriend's life was taken.

programme.title: Nightmare in the Desert
programme.desc: After returning to her childhood home, someone secretly tracks an outdoor enthusiast and her urbanite boyfriend through the desert.

programme.title: Murder in Nashville
programme.desc: A woman gets swept up in a whirlwind romance with the son of a wealthy power player in the country music scene.

programme.title: Crowdsource Murder
programme.desc: A friend encourages Monica to start a crowdsource fund to pay for her daughter's hospital bills. However, when a seemingly generous man donates more and more money, she begins to question his motives.

programme.title: Stalked by My Amish Boyfriend
programme.desc: Carly develops a relationship with Abram, a young Amish man. Their seemingly innocent courtship soon takes a dark turn when Abram refuses to return home.

programme.title: Amish Stud: The Eli Weaver Story
programme.desc: A man who calls himself Amish Stud plots with his mistress to murder his wife, to the horror of his conservative Amish community.

programme.title: Michael Jackson: Searching for Neverland
programme.desc: Chronicles the intimate moments between Jackson and his children, and documents the professional turbulence that engulfed Jackson, eventually forcing him back to rehearsals for an ill-fated tour.

programme.title: The Railway Man
programme.desc: The captivating, true story of a man who discovers the Japanese officer who tortured him during the war is still alive, and sets out to confront him.

programme.title: Red Joan
programme.desc: Inspired by the true story of English-born Joan Stanley, who was recruited by the KGB in the mid 1930s and went undetected as a British spy for over a half a century.

programme.title: Mr. Turner
programme.desc: An acclaimed account of the great British painter who was a radical and revolutionary artist.

programme.title: Nowhere Special
programme.desc: A single father dedicates the last few months of his life to finding a new family for his four-year-old son.

programme.title: A Guide To Second Date Sex
programme.desc: Laura and Ryan have been totally destroyed by previous relationships. In the hope of getting it right, they go on a second date having no idea what they're supposed to do.

programme.title: The Duke
programme.desc: In 1961, Kempton Bunton, a 60-year-old taxi driver, steals Goya's portrait of the Duke of Wellington from the National Gallery in London. What happened next became the stuff of legend.

programme.title: Death at a Funeral
programme.desc: A dignified send-off for a loved one erupts into uproarious chaos when a myriad of outrageous calamities befall the eccentric grief stricken mourners.

programme.title: The Queen of Ireland
programme.desc: Documentary following the life of Irish drag queen Panti Bliss, in the lead up to the historic referendum on marriage equality for same-sex couples in Ireland.

programme.title: Nowhere Boy
programme.desc: Biopic of John Lennon's early life. Abandoned by his mother and raised by a prim and proper aunt, the rebellious teen is soon drawn to rock 'n' roll.

programme.title: The Iron Lady
programme.desc: One of the 20th century's most influential women, Margaret Thatcher smashed through barriers of gender and class to be heard in a male-dominated world.

programme.title: Churchill
programme.desc: A ticking-clock thriller following Winston Churchill in the 96 hours before D-day.

programme.title: A Long Way Down
programme.desc: Four people considering ending their own lives suddenly find a little sunshine when they come together on New Year's Eve.

programme.title: The Angels' Share
programme.desc: Scotland. A whimsical crime caper about four crooks in Glasgow who find redemption, if not exactly rehabilitation, through an unlikely whisky heist.

programme.title: Animals
programme.desc: Laura and Tyler are entering their 30s intent on keeping up their hedonistic lifestyle. That is, until Laura falls in love with Jim and begins to question all of her choices.

programme.title: Brooklyn
programme.desc: An Irish immigrant lands in 1950s Brooklyn, where she falls in love with a local. But when her past catches up with her, she must choose between two countries.

programme.title: Coda
programme.desc: A slain Australian coed's best friend and her friend are stalked by a campus mystery man.

programme.title: Heaven's Burning
programme.desc: A Japanese woman attempts to start a new life in Australia after leaving her husband on their honeymoon.

programme.title: Inn of the Damned
programme.desc: A sheriff investigates why the guests at a local hostelry check in, but never check out.

programme.title: Once Around the Sun
programme.desc: A look at the musical acts who performed at Australia's first rock festival, The Pilgrimage For Pop Festival, at Ourimbah in 1970.

programme.title: BMX Bandits
programme.desc: A movie about a cache of stolen walkie-talkies, young BMX riders, and ruthless bank robbers pursuing them. A 1980s Down Under cult classic.

programme.title: Sons of Steel
programme.desc: When Aussie heavy metal singer and peace activist Black Alice finds himself in a dystopian future, he must go back in time to save the world from a nuclear disaster.

programme.title: Skippy
programme.desc: Skippy leads Sonny to an aspiring young ballerina who has been studying the dance of the lyrebird. When the lyrebird mimics an old man coughing, they search for a botanist.

programme.title: Ship to Shore
programme.desc: The tensions within the Crump family are stretched when Kelvin decides he was born into the family as punishment for a past life.

programme.title: Heartbreak High
programme.desc: Deloraine's retirement brings in a new principal; Danielle is expelled for drug possession.

programme.title: Two Hands
programme.desc: An aspiring hooligan loses $10,000 when he acts as a courier for a drug dealing gangster.

programme.title: Rough Diamonds
programme.desc: A traffic accident leads to romance and the realisation of dreams for a lawyer's wife and an Australian truck driver.

programme.title: Mad Dog Morgan
programme.desc: A marauding bushranger Dan Morgan self-destructs on madness and revenge.

programme.title: The Go-Betweens: Right Here
programme.desc: A heartfelt story uncovering the intensely passionate and fraught relationships that formed one of the most influential bands in Australian rock history.

programme.title: Skippy
programme.desc: A mysterious disease threatens to wipe out all animals in the Waratah National Park, and Skippy is suspected of being the carrier.

programme.title: Ship to Shore
programme.desc: Hermes' Greek heritage catches up with him when he learns his parents had betrothed him to a young girl while he was in the cradle.

programme.title: Heartbreak High
programme.desc: Roller-skating Bolton collides with principal Dyson; Con revamps the Shark Pool.

programme.title: Walkabout
programme.desc: Two young siblings are stranded in the Australian outback and are forced to cope on their own. They meet an Australian boy on walkabout: a ritual separation from his tribe.

programme.title: Storm Boy
programme.desc: Storm Boy lives an idyllic life where the Murray River meets the sea. But, growing up, he is forced to choose between a life of continued isolation and the challenges of the outside world.

programme.title: Heartbreak High
programme.desc: Roller-skating Bolton collides with principal Dyson; Con revamps the Shark Pool.

programme.title: Test: AUS v Windies: 2009/10 3rd Test
programme.desc: Australia chases a clean sweep, but the West Indies, with power-hitter Chris Gayle, are eager to defy. Australian all-rounder Shane Watson looks to continue his strong contributions.

programme.title: Test: AUS v Windies: 2022 1st Test
programme.desc: Australia's batting maestros Marnus Labuschagne and Steve Smith prepare for battle against Kraigg Brathwaite's West Indies in the opening 2022 Test.

programme.title: Test: AUS v Windies: 2022 2nd Test
programme.desc: Australia seeks to extend its lead. Marnus Labuschagne's runs have been pivotal, but Kraigg Brathwaite's West Indies are desperate to turn the tide in this crucial encounter.

programme.title: Test: AUS v Windies: 2024 1st Test
programme.desc: Pat Cummins leads Australia into battle against a revitalized West Indies. All eyes are on the electric Shamar Joseph as he aims to make an immediate impact.

programme.title: Test: AUS v Windies: 2024 2nd Test
programme.desc: An extraordinary bowling effort from Shamar Joseph turns the tide for the West Indies at the Gabba. While Pat Cummins' Australia faces pressure in a desperate chase for victory.

programme.title: Test ENG v IND: 1st Test
programme.desc: A new chapter begins as India, under captain Shubman Gill, takes on England in a five-match series. Both teams will aim to start their World Test Championship cycle strongly with key players like Joe Root and Jasprit Bumrah ready to fire.

programme.title: Test: AUS v Windies: 2000/01 3rd Test
programme.desc: Steve Waugh's dominant Australia push for a series win. Can Brian Lara inspire a West Indies fightback to defy the odds?

programme.title: Test: AUS v Windies: 1984/85 1st Test
programme.desc: The summer of 1984/85 ignites as the invincible West Indies, spearheaded by Michael Holding's lightning pace, arrive on Australian shores. Can Terry Alderman and the Australians withstand this opening onslaught?

programme.title: Test: AUS v Windies: 1984/85 2nd Test
programme.desc: Australia strives to find answers against the seemingly unstoppable West Indies.

programme.title: Test: AUS v Windies: 1984/85 3rd Test
programme.desc: Australia seeks a breakthrough in the 1984 series. While Lawson probes with the ball, Wessels digs deep with the bat. Can they find an answer to the relentless brilliance of Malcolm Marshall and the West Indies?

programme.title: Test: AUS v Windies: 1984/85 4th Test
programme.desc: The Boxing Day Test of 1984. Andrew Hilditch stands firm for Australia, but the power of Viv Richards and the West Indies' fearsome attack loom large.

programme.title: Test: AUS v Windies: 1984/85 5th Test
programme.desc: The 1984-85 series culminates. Bob Holland's spin aims to outwit the mighty West Indies. Can Kepler Wessels inspire Australia to a memorable end against one of cricket's greatest teams?

programme.title: Test: AUS v Windies: 1992/93 2nd Test
programme.desc: The summer of 1992/93 ignites as Australia, with its formidable lineup including Allan Border and a young Shane Warne, seeks to assert a dominant win over the West Indies.

programme.title: Test: AUS v Windies: 1992/93 4th Test
programme.desc: A defining Test in Adelaide, as the West Indies, spearheaded by the electrifying Brian Lara and fearsome Curtly Ambrose, battle to try level the series against a resilient Australian side.

programme.title: Test: AUS v Windies: 1996/97 2nd Test
programme.desc: The 1996/97 summer brings a clash of titans as Mark Taylor's Australia, featuring the precision of Glenn McGrath, face a West Indies determined to turn the tide, led by the legendary Courtney Walsh.

programme.title: Test: AUS v Windies: 2000/01 3rd Test
programme.desc: Steve Waugh's dominant Australia push for a series win. Can Brian Lara inspire a West Indies fightback to defy the odds?

programme.title: Test: AUS v Windies: 2000/01 4th Test
programme.desc: Australia holds a commanding 3-0 series lead heading to the Boxing Day Test. Steve Waugh aims for another dominant game against the West Indies, who will look to Brian Lara and Marlon Samuels to ignite a comeback.

programme.title: Test: AUS v Windies: 2005/06 3rd Test
programme.desc: In 2005, Australia aims to cement its supremacy. But the brilliant Brian Lara sparks a West Indies revival against the in-form Australian batsmen Matthew Hayden and Michael Hussey.

programme.title: Test: AUS v Windies: 2009/10 3rd Test
programme.desc: Australia chases a clean sweep, but the West Indies, with power-hitter Chris Gayle, are eager to defy. Australian all-rounder Shane Watson looks to continue his strong contributions.

programme.title: Test: AUS v Windies: 2022 1st Test
programme.desc: Australia's batting maestros Marnus Labuschagne and Steve Smith prepare for battle against Kraigg Brathwaite's West Indies in the opening 2022 Test.

programme.title: Hachi: A Dog's Tale
programme.desc: Professor Wilson discovers a lost Akita puppy on his way home. Despite objections from his wife, Hachi endears himself to the family and grows to be Parker's loyal companion.

programme.title: Billy Graham Classics
programme.desc: Travel back in time to join Dr Billy Graham and his crusade team at the events that changed the lives of thousands around the world.

programme.title: GGC Life TV

programme.title: New Creation Church
programme.sub-title: Protected By The Blood Of Jesus Pt 2 of 3
programme.desc: Pastor Joseph Prince preaches messages centred on the gospel of the grace of God. His desire is to help believers understand grace and how greatly blessed they are by their heavenly Father.

programme.title: Connect

programme.title: Jentezen Franklin
programme.desc: New York Times bestselling author, Pastor Jentezen Franklin, brings practical meaning to spiritual truths found in God's Word. Kingdom Connection is the teaching ministry of Free Chapel, a multi-campus church with a global ministry.

programme.title: The Christian View
programme.desc: A fast-paced, high-energy half-hour show with a panel of sharp, well-educated, quick-witted women and men - and the occasional guest co-host - discussing today's hot topics and headlines from a Biblical perspective.

programme.title: The Restoration Road
programme.desc: As we travel this side of life, none of us arrive anywhere by accident. We choose, think, pray, and feel our way to our destination. Our inner GPS guides us to one of two places: destruction or restoration.

programme.title: Bible Discovery TV
programme.desc: Hosted by the Hembree family, Bible Discovery TV is a thirty-minute daily devotional show where Rod, Janice, Ryan and Corie walk you through the Word in a way that will forever change how you read, learn and experience the Bible.

programme.title: Answers with Bayless Conley
programme.sub-title: They Had Been with Jesus (Harrison Conley)
programme.desc: In his powerful message They Had Been with Jesus, Pastor Harrison Conley reflects on the apostle Peter's remarkable transformation and reveals how genuine encounters with Christ transform.

programme.title: Katherine Ruonala Ministries
programme.desc: Katherine Ruonala shares a practical message of love and hope to the nations.

programme.title: The 700 Club
programme.desc: With news, interviews, lifestyle features and true-life stories from a Christian perspective, The 700 Club shares powerful and dramatic testimonies of God touching people's lives.

programme.title: Joyce Meyer: Enjoying Everyday Life
programme.desc: Are you ready to be encouraged and challenged to reach new levels in God? Would you like to be a more effective Christian in your busy world? Then Joyce Meyer's common sense approach to powerfully living the Christian life is for you.

programme.title: In Touch
programme.sub-title: Help For Our Healing/A Life of Love
programme.desc: Tackling important life issues such as parenting, finances, personal crises, emotions, and relationships, Dr Stanley fervently believes the Bible to be the inerrant Word of God.

programme.title: Hachi: A Dog's Tale
programme.desc: Professor Wilson discovers a lost Akita puppy on his way home. Despite objections from his wife, Hachi endears himself to the family and grows to be Parker's loyal companion.

programme.title: Jeni: Seeking the Extraordinary
programme.desc: Jeni and Casey are back this time road-tripping around the Pacific North West, seeing the sights, and meeting extraordinary people along the way.

programme.title: Holy Moly
programme.desc: This program turns the Bible into a living, breathing colouring book that will delight children of all ages. The series focuses on the Biblical characters' actions and emotions.

programme.title: Elevation Experience
programme.desc: The Elevation Experience with Pastor Steven Furtick features inspirational and challenging messages from Pastor Steven as well as original worship music from Elevation Church in Charlotte, North Carolina.

programme.title: A Moment in History
programme.sub-title: The Final 24 Hours of Jesus Life
programme.desc: Join host Seth Udinski as he explores the most pivotal moments in history and the Bible, providing insight into the events that have shaped our world.

programme.title: Faith Runs Deep
programme.desc: In this new program from the producers of the award-winning series, Jesus the Game Changer, host Karl Faase travels around Australia in an iconic Holden ute, discovering a rich and inspiring history of faith.

programme.title: Drive Thru History: Ends of the Earth
programme.desc: Ends of the Earth takes viewers on a 19-episode, global trek to every corner of the earth, to show how God has used ordinary people throughout history to take His saving grace to every nation and people.

programme.title: Bible Land Passages
programme.desc: Read about places like Beersheba, Jericho, Jerusalem, Caesarea, and cities surrounding the Sea of Galilee, and discover that those places exist just as the Bible describes.

programme.title: The Incredible Journey
programme.desc: Acclaimed speaker & TV presenter Gary Kent has produced numerous documentaries on subjects including the Bible, Bible prophecy, world events, historical places & natural health. His passion is to share the good news of Jesus' soon return.
