programme.sub-title: Protected By The Blood Of Jesus Pt 3 of 3
programme.desc: Pastor Joseph Prince preaches messages centred on the gospel of the grace of God. His desire is to help believers understand grace and how greatly blessed they are by their heavenly Father.

programme.title: Joel Osteen
programme.desc: Direct from Houston, Texas, join Joel and Victoria Osteen and the team from Lakewood Church, for a session of powerful music and empowering preaching.

programme.title: The Way of the Master
programme.desc: The Living Waters team answers questions from students about God and the bible.

programme.title: Joyce Meyer: Enjoying Everyday Life
programme.desc: Are you ready to be encouraged and challenged to reach new levels in God? Would you like to be a more effective Christian in your busy world? Then Joyce Meyer's common sense approach to powerfully living the Christian life is for you.

programme.title: Thelma
programme.desc: When 93-year-old Thelma Post gets duped by a phone scammer pretending to be her grandson, she sets out on a treacherous quest across the city to reclaim what was taken from her.

programme.title: Tuesday
programme.desc: A mother and her teenage daughter must confront Death when it arrives in the form of an astonishing talking bird.

programme.title: Madame Web
programme.desc: After showing signs of clairvoyance, New York City paramedic Cassandra Webb must confront revelations about her past and protect three young women from a mysterious adversary who wants them dead.

programme.title: Unsung Hero
programme.desc: Based on a remarkable true story, a mother's faith stands against all odds and inspires her husband and children to hold on to theirs.

programme.title: The Forge
programme.desc: After graduating from high school without any plans for the future, Isaiah receives a push to start making better life decisions.

programme.title: Reunion
programme.desc: Snowbound at their high school reunion, former classmates uncover a murder and scramble to identify the killer among them before they're all iced out for good.

programme.title: And Mrs
programme.desc: When a reluctant bride-to-be's fiance drops dead, she insists on marrying him anyway, vowing to overcome public opinion, the law of the land, and her loved one's objections.

programme.title: The Fabulous Four
programme.desc: The story of two friends who travel to be bridesmaids in a surprise wedding of their college girlfriend.

programme.title: Greedy People
programme.desc: Residents of a small island town navigate a murder and the discovery of a million dollars, a series of increasingly bad decisions upend the once peaceful community.

programme.title: Mack & Rita
programme.desc: Wakes up after being struck by lightning in a sound bath regression pod to find she has magically transformed into her 70-year-old self.

programme.title: Wicked
programme.desc: In Oz, two clashing witches, Elphaba and Glinda, form an unlikely friendship. Elphaba, wrongly labeled wicked, seeks to expose the corrupt Wizard ruling the land.

programme.title: Saturday Night
programme.desc: Tensions run high as producer Lorne Michaels and a ferocious troupe of young comedians and writers prepare for the first broadcast of "Saturday Night Live" on Oct. 11, 1975.

programme.title: Relax, I'm from the Future
programme.desc: Casper, a time traveller, arrives in the present with a habit of meeting people he knows are about to die and confessing the truth about himself.

programme.title: The Killer
programme.desc: An assassin tries to make amends in an effort to restore the sight of a beautiful young singer.

programme.title: Galaxy Quest
programme.desc: The alumni cast of a cult space TV show have to play their roles as the real thing when an alien race needs their help.

programme.title: Scary Movie
programme.desc: In this send-up of the most popular horror movies, a familiar-looking group of teenagers find themselves being stalked by a more-than-vaguely recognisable masked killer.

programme.title: Charlie's Angels
programme.desc: When a devious mastermind embroils them in a plot to destroy individual privacy, the Angels set out to bring down the bad guys. But a revelation makes the Angels targets for assassination.

programme.title: Big Daddy
programme.desc: In this romantic comedy, Sonny Koufax is a carefree slob trying to save his love life by becoming responsible. He gets the chance when a cute kid turns up needing a father.

programme.title: Cast Away
programme.desc: A FedEx systems engineer's ruled-by-the-clock existence abruptly ends when a harrowing plane crash leaves him isolated on a remote island.

programme.title: How the Grinch Stole Christmas
programme.desc: He's mean and green and he hates the yo-ho-hoing. The Grinch conspires to steal Christmas from Whoville, making off with the presents, decorations, trees and every other joyful thing.

programme.title: Meet the Parents
programme.desc: Greg is poised to propose to his girlfriend during a visit to her parents' home. But he needs to ask her father. However, Pam's ex-CIA father takes an immediate dislike to her less-than-truthful beau.

programme.title: American Pie
programme.desc: Four unlucky in love friends who make a pact: lose their virginity by prom night. Manipulating their way into the hearts of some of their classmates, their plans often backfire with hilarity.

programme.title: Almost Famous
programme.desc: A coming-of-age story about an aspiring teenage writer who, ignoring the advice of his mother, goes on the road with an almost famous band in the '70s.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible II
programme.desc: A secret agent is sent to Sydney to find and destroy a genetically modified disease called Chimera.

programme.title: Snatch
programme.desc: Crooked boxing promoters, violent bookies, a Russian gangster, incompetent robbers, and suss jewellers fight over a priceless stolen diamond.

programme.title: The Perfect Storm
programme.desc: Based on a terrifyingly true and tragic story, a fishing crew sail into a disastrous storm when three hurricanes merge, creating mountainous waves.

programme.title: The Bone Collector
programme.desc: A bedridden detective teams up with a sharp rookie to catch a sadistic killer who leaves bizarre clues behind. As they close in they become his next targets.

programme.title: Puss in Boots
programme.desc: After Puss in Boots was blamed for a bank robbery in San Ricardo, engineered against his wishes by Humpty Dumpty, Puss leaves Humpty to his fate. Now reunited, they try to trust each other again.

programme.title: The Munsters
programme.desc: From Rob Zombie comes the strangest love story ever told as Herman and Lily's crazy courtship takes The Munsters on a hauntingly hilarious trip from Transylvania to Hollywood.

programme.title: How to Train Your Dragon
programme.desc: Set in the mythical world of burly Vikings and fire-breathing dragons, a Viking teenager takes in an injured dragon and sees an opportunity to set his tribe on a new course.

programme.title: The Garfield Movie
programme.desc: Garfield, the Monday-hating, lasagna-loving indoor cat, is about to have a wild outdoor adventure.

programme.title: Detective Pikachu
programme.desc: Ace detective Harry Goodman goes missing, prompting his son Tim to find out what happened. Aiding the investigation is Harry's former Pokemon partner, Detective Pikachu.

programme.title: The Polar Express
programme.desc: On Christmas Eve, a doubting boy boards a magical train that's headed to the North Pole and Santa Claus's home.

programme.title: Captain Underpants: The First Epic Movie
programme.desc: George and Harold are BFFs who accidentally hypnotise their principal into believing he's the hero named Captain Underpants. They must stop a new teacher who is bent on ridding the world of laughter.

programme.title: Stuart Little 2
programme.desc: Stuart, the Little family's lonely mouse 'son', gets into strife by befriending a canary.

programme.title: The Karate Kid (2010)
programme.desc: Dre, a young boy, finds himself bullied by Cheng, a rebellious kung fu prodigy at his school. However, things change after he befriends Mr Han, a maintenance man, who happens to be a kung fu expert.

programme.title: The Boss Baby: Family Business
programme.desc: Boss Baby continues to navigate the cutthroat corporate jungle gym of Baby Corp, while angling to achieve the near-impossible: the work-life balance of a modern career baby.

programme.title: Journey 2: The Mysterious Island
programme.desc: The journey begins when young adventurer Sean receives a coded distress signal from a mysterious island where no island should exist.

programme.title: Cloudy With a Chance of Meatballs
programme.desc: A local scientist is often regarded as a failure until he invents a machine that can make food fall from the sky. But little does he know, things are about to take a turn for the worse.

programme.title: Despicable Me
programme.desc: In a happy neighbourhood with picket fences and rose bushes sits a black house with a dead lawn. In the cellar is a hideout where a dastardly villain is plotting a huge heist - he wants to steal the moon!

programme.title: Despicable Me 2
programme.desc: Get ready for more Minion madness! Just as Gru has given up being super-bad to be a super-dad, the Anti-Villain League recruits him to track down a new criminal mastermind and save the world.

programme.title: Sinbad: Legend of the Seven Seas
programme.desc: It's high-seas adventure when legendary swashbuckler Sinbad, his loyal pooch Spike, and the daring Princess Marina face off against the trickster Goddess of Chaos and her mischievous monsters.

programme.title: The Sloth Lane
programme.desc: After a terrifying storm destroys their home, a speedy sloth named Laura and her kooky family move to the big city in their rusted old food truck hoping to make their business a success.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible - Fallout
programme.desc: On a dangerous assignment, Ethan chooses to save his team over completing the mission, allowing nuclear weapons to fall into the wrong hands. The IMF team must stop the fallout.

programme.title: Men in Black 3
programme.desc: Agent J travels in time to MIB's early years in the 1960s to stop an alien from assassinating his friend Agent K and changing history.

programme.title: Man of Steel
programme.desc: A man learns that he has extraordinary powers and is not of this Earth. But the hero in him must emerge if he is to save the world from annihilation and become the symbol of hope for all mankind.

programme.title: Spider-Man: No Way Home
programme.desc: When a spell goes wrong, dangerous foes from other worlds start to appear, forcing Peter to discover what it truly means to be Spider-Man.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible - Fallout
programme.desc: On a dangerous assignment, Ethan chooses to save his team over completing the mission, allowing nuclear weapons to fall into the wrong hands. The IMF team must stop the fallout.

programme.title: Jurassic Park
programme.desc: An experiment with dinosaurs created from DNA becomes a disaster when sabotage sets the prehistoric monsters loose in an island theme park.

programme.title: Spider-Man
programme.desc: After a radioactive spider bite, a nerdy teen develops keen senses and amazing strength.

programme.title: Skyscraper
programme.desc: A security expert must infiltrate a burning skyscraper, 225 storeys above ground, when his family are trapped inside by criminals.

programme.title: Death Race 4: Beyond Anarchy
programme.desc: Connor Gibson, a Black Ops specialist, infiltrates a maximum security prison to enter the Death Race. A brutal world of no guards, no rules, no track, and no fear.

programme.title: Tenet
programme.desc: The Protagonist journeys through a world of international espionage on a mission that will unfold into something beyond real time.

programme.title: The Accountant
programme.desc: A math savant with more affinity for numbers than people works as a freelance accountant for some of the world's most dangerous criminal organisations.

programme.title: Scream
programme.desc: After a series of mysterious deaths befall their small town, an offbeat group of friends led by Sidney Prescott become the target of a masked killer.

programme.title: Johnny English Strikes Again
programme.desc: After a cyber-attack reveals the identity of all of the active undercover agents in Britain, Johnny English is forced to come out of retirement to find the mastermind hacker.

programme.title: Hot Fuzz
programme.desc: A big-city cop is reassigned to an idyllic, quiet town. But his dull existence is interrupted by suspicious accidents.

programme.title: Central Intelligence
programme.desc: A mild-mannered accountant whose glory days are behind him, bumps into a formerly nerdy classmate and is pulled into the high-stakes world of international espionage.

programme.title: Benchwarmers 2: Breaking Balls
programme.desc: After his big league dreams are crushed, Ben McGrath is reluctant to take another swing at redemption for his boss' law firm softball team.

programme.title: The Boss
programme.desc: After doing time for insider trading, an entrepreneur wastes no time in devising a winner-take-all plan to rebuild her empire.

programme.title: Pineapple Express
programme.desc: A pothead who sees a crooked cop committing a murder goes on the run with his dealer.

programme.title: Tag
programme.desc: Based on a true story. For one month every year, five highly competitive friends hit the ground running in a no-holds-barred game of tag they've been playing since the first grade.

programme.title: Liar Liar
programme.desc: A fast-talking lawyer and habitual liar discovers that he is unable to tell a lie or withhold the truth about anything for 24 hours after his son makes a birthday wish that comes true.

programme.title: Daddy's Home 2
programme.desc: Having finally gotten used to each other's existence, Brad and Dusty must now deal with their intrusive fathers during the holidays.

programme.title: Talladega Nights
programme.desc: Racing sensation Ricky Bobby is a hero because of his "win at all costs" approach. When a French driver challenges him for the supremacy of NASCAR, Ricky must face his own demons.

programme.title: Paul Blart: Mall Cop 2
programme.desc: After six years of keeping New Jersey malls safe, an overzealous security guard learns that duty never rests when he heads to Las Vegas for a well-earned vacation with his teen daughter.

programme.title: Grown Ups
programme.desc: Five high school pals reunite after 30 years at a July Fourth celebration and wrestle with the challenges of adulthood. No one wants to be the grown-up of the gang.

programme.title: Semi-Pro
programme.desc: The worst team in the renegade American Basketball Association is on the brink of collapse, but can it rebound to salvation?

programme.title: Scary Movie
programme.desc: In this send-up of the most popular horror movies, a familiar-looking group of teenagers find themselves being stalked by a more-than-vaguely recognisable masked killer.

programme.title: Daddy's Home 2
programme.desc: Having finally gotten used to each other's existence, Brad and Dusty must now deal with their intrusive fathers during the holidays.

programme.title: Hitch
programme.desc: Hitch is a cocky and successful date doctor for the unlucky in love, but when he falls for gossip columnist Sara, he forgets his own rules.

programme.title: The High Note
programme.desc: Set in the dazzling world of the LA music scene comes the story of Grace Davis, a superstar whose talent, and ego, have reached unbelievable heights.

programme.title: Single White Female
programme.desc: A woman's ad for a female tenant opens the door to unrelenting terror. She takes over her spare room, her boyfriend and her identity.

programme.title: Ladies in Black
programme.desc: Adapted from the novel by Madeleine St John, this is an alluring and tender-hearted comedy drama about the lives of a group of department store employees in 1959 Sydney.

programme.title: Girls Trip
programme.desc: Four lifelong friends travel to New Orleans for the annual Essence Festival. There's enough dancing, drinking, brawling and romancing to make the Big Easy blush.

programme.title: Crazy Rich Asians
programme.desc: Native New Yorker Rachel accompanies her long-time boyfriend Nick to his friend's wedding in Singapore. But she's unprepared to learn a few key details about his life.

programme.title: Hitch
programme.desc: Hitch is a cocky and successful date doctor for the unlucky in love, but when he falls for gossip columnist Sara, he forgets his own rules.

programme.title: Monster-In-Law
programme.desc: Charlotte finally finds the man of her dreams only to discover that his mother is the woman of her nightmares.

programme.title: Honey: Rise Up And Dance
programme.desc: An aspiring and determined street dancer comes out of the shadow of her trained dancer sister, and joins a dance competition to win the prize of a college scholarship.

programme.title: Life Without Dick
programme.desc: After Colleen accidentally kills her boyfriend Dick, mafia hit-man Daniel offers to take credit for the murder.

programme.title: This Is Where I Leave You
programme.desc: When their father dies, four grown siblings, bruised and banged up by their respective adult lives, are forced to return to their childhood home and live under the same roof together for a week.

programme.title: The First Wives Club
programme.desc: This is a sinfully satisfying revenge romp that follows three women who are reunited by the death of a college friend, teaming up they embark on a mission to teach their cheating ex-husbands a lesson.

programme.title: Book Club
programme.desc: Four lifelong friends have their lives forever changed after reading 50 Shades of Grey in their monthly book club.

programme.title: Scent of a Woman
programme.desc: An overbearing, blind, and retired lieutenant colonel hires a young guardian to assist him. They embark on a wild weekend trip that will change the lives of both men forever.

programme.title: Snatch
programme.desc: Crooked boxing promoters, violent bookies, a Russian gangster, incompetent robbers, and suss jewellers fight over a priceless stolen diamond.

programme.title: The Da Vinci Code
programme.desc: A Harvard professor implicated in a murder must unravel an ancient code to expose the greatest conspiracy in history.

programme.title: Ordinary Angels
programme.desc: A struggling hairdresser finds a renewed sense of purpose when she meets a widowed father and his two daughters.

programme.title: Downton Abbey
programme.desc: After six unforgettable seasons, the global phenomenon heads to the big screen for the next chapter of the Crawley family saga.

programme.title: Snatch
programme.desc: Crooked boxing promoters, violent bookies, a Russian gangster, incompetent robbers, and suss jewellers fight over a priceless stolen diamond.

programme.title: Miller's Girl
programme.desc: A creative writing assignment yields complex results between a teacher and his talented student.

programme.title: 8 Mile
programme.desc: For Jimmy Smith Jr, life is a daily fight just to keep hope alive.

programme.title: Uproar
programme.desc: A 17-year-old student is forced to get off the fence he has actively sat on all his life to stand up for himself, his whanau (family) and his future in this story of identity.

programme.title: Trouble with the Curve
programme.desc: Gus Lobel has been a top baseball scout for decades, but age has caught up with him. Enter Gus's estranged daughter, an ambitious attorney who joins him for one last recruiting trip.

programme.title: The Bourne Supremacy
programme.desc: Suffering from amnesia, Bourne has left his violent past behind and is living a normal life with Marie. His plans for a peaceful life are crushed when he narrowly escapes an assassination attempt.

programme.title: Catch Me If You Can
programme.desc: This is the extraordinary true story of a brilliant young master of deception and the FBI agent hot on his trail.

programme.title: Instant Family
programme.desc: Pete and Ellie must learn the ropes of instant parenthood when they bring in three foster-children.

programme.title: Cast Away
programme.desc: A FedEx systems engineer's ruled-by-the-clock existence abruptly ends when a harrowing plane crash leaves him isolated on a remote island.

programme.title: Parenthood
programme.desc: An unforgettable and hilarious portrait of life's most rewarding occupation: Parenthood. The Buckmans are a modern-day family facing the age-old dilemma of trying to raise children the right way.

programme.title: Scarface
programme.desc: The violent Cuban gangster Tony 'Scarface' Montana becomes a cocaine king in Miami. His greed and ego prove his undoing as ruthless rivals plot to take over his drug empire.

programme.title: Houseboat
programme.desc: A widowed man and his three children fall for an Italian woman who joins their floating home as housekeeper. He wins both their love and hers too.

programme.title: The Karate Kid (1984)
programme.desc: A new kid in town who is picked on by bullies learns karate and eastern philosophy from Mr Miyagi, and learns how to fight back.

programme.title: The Karate Kid: Part II
programme.desc: Daniel, now a karate champ, goes to Okinawa with Mr Miyagi, his mentor. Miyagi rekindles an old flame while Daniel finds love, and enemies, of his own.

programme.title: The Karate Kid: Part III
programme.desc: A bad guy from the original Karate Kid plots revenge on young Daniel and his mentor Miyagi after they defeat his karate school and ruin his business.

programme.title: Beverly Hills Cop II
programme.desc: The hard-nosed Detroit cop returns to Los Angeles to solve another case. This time, he must direct his efforts towards unravelling the Alphabet Crimes, a series of robberies committed by punks.

programme.title: National Lampoon's Christmas Vacation
programme.desc: The Griswold family's plans for a big family Christmas predictably turn into a big disaster.

programme.title: Foul Play
programme.desc: This bizarre, Hitchcockian comedy sees a kooky divorcee and a bumbling Federal agent take on a posse of Hollywood weirdos planning to assassinate the Pope.

programme.title: A Few Good Men
programme.desc: A slick, young Navy lawyer is assigned to investigate a murder case in which two Marines killed a fellow enlisted man, and no one's talking.

programme.title: The Green Mile
programme.desc: A gentle giant of a prisoner with supernatural powers brings a sense of spirit and humanity to the guards and inmates on death row.

programme.title: Schindler's List
programme.desc: The true story of Nazi party member Oskar Schindler, who saved the lives of more than 1100 Jews during the Holocaust.

programme.title: Michael Jackson: Searching for Neverland
programme.desc: Chronicles the intimate moments between Jackson and his children, and documents the professional turbulence that engulfed Jackson, eventually forcing him back to rehearsals for an ill-fated tour.

programme.title: V.C Andrews' Ruby
programme.desc: In the heart of the bayou, Ruby Landry lives a simple, happy life. The only family Ruby has ever known are her loving guardian, Grandmere Catherine, and her drunken Grandpere Jack.

programme.title: Britney Ever After
programme.desc: The true story of Britney Jean Spears, one of the bestselling teenage music artists of all-time, whose dating life and public emotional breakdowns were the subjects of a worldwide media frenzy.

programme.title: Girl in the Basement
programme.desc: Sara, a vibrant teen, was looking forward to her 18th birthday so she could move away from her controlling father. But before she could even blow out the candles, her world became extremely dark.

programme.title: Who Killed JonBenet?
programme.desc: Revisit the infamous murder of pint-sized beauty queen JonBenet Ramsey and the lurid details that captivated a nation.

programme.title: The Pastor's Wife
programme.desc: Mary, a dutiful preacher's wife and mother of three, becomes the prime suspect in her husband's murder. What went on behind this perfect family's closed doors? Based on a true story.

programme.title: Secrets of Eden
programme.desc: A small-town minister is accused of the deaths of two beloved parishioners when evidence surfaces that the family wasn't quite as perfect as they appeared.

programme.title: Cyberstalker
programme.desc: An online stalker torments a young woman.

programme.title: The Perfect Teacher
programme.desc: When spoiled, beautiful high-schooler Devon sets her sights on her handsome teacher, she won't take no for an answer.

programme.title: Blonde and Blonder
programme.desc: When two dimwitted, blonde bombshells are mistaken for the underworld's most cunning assassins, they are approached with a lucrative contract to take out the head of the Chinese mafia.

programme.title: Michael Jackson: Searching for Neverland
programme.desc: Chronicles the intimate moments between Jackson and his children, and documents the professional turbulence that engulfed Jackson, eventually forcing him back to rehearsals for an ill-fated tour.

programme.title: I Was Octomom
programme.desc: In 2009, Natalie Suleman gives birth to eight children with the help of IVF, only to have her life torn apart, and her identity rebranded by the media.

programme.title: Nightmare School Moms
programme.desc: Two mothers battle to see which of their overachieving daughters will be accepted to a prestigious university. However, when one of their methods quickly spirals out of control, the games turn deadly.

programme.title: A Model Murder
programme.desc: Model Kara Woods gets disturbing fan messages and turns to a security influencer, until her stalker shows up in real life, turning fear into reality.

programme.title: Murder at the Derby
programme.desc: Kara lands her dream job at a prestigious horse stable under Jennifer's mentorship, but tensions rise when Jennifer's jealous brother puts everyone's lives at risk.

programme.title: Happy Face Killer
programme.desc: Grisly serial killer Keith Hunter Jesperson taunts authorities with scribbled confessions bearing a smiley face at the scenes of his crimes. Based on a true story.

programme.title: Brooklyn
programme.desc: An Irish immigrant lands in 1950s Brooklyn, where she falls in love with a local. But when her past catches up with her, she must choose between two countries.

programme.title: The Limehouse Golem
programme.desc: When a series of brutal murders occur in London, the community believes that a legendary dark creature must be responsible.

programme.title: The Descent: Part 2
programme.desc: A dazed and bloodied woman emerges alone from the Appalachian cave system, but she must return to help find her missing friends and face the terror lurking there.

programme.title: Franklyn
programme.desc: Set between the parallel universe of present-day London and a futuristic metropolis, this is a fantasy thriller about four troubled souls whose worlds collide.

programme.title: Suffragette
programme.desc: In early 20th-century Britain, a young working mother joins a diverse group of women who fight for equality and the right to vote.

programme.title: Neds
programme.desc: Encompassed by violent street gangs, neglectful parents, bullying teachers and a lack of positive role models, a studious, but emotionally abandoned kid turns thug.

programme.title: Testament of Youth
programme.desc: Based on the World War I memoir by Vera Brittain, the tale of one woman's searing journey from youthful hopes and dreams to the edge of despair and back again.

programme.title: Belle
programme.desc: The mixed-race daughter, Dido Elizabeth Belle, of Royal Navy Captain Sir John Lindsay is raised by aristocratic Great-uncle Lord William Murray, 1st Earl of Mansfield in eighteenth century England.

programme.title: Brooklyn
programme.desc: An Irish immigrant lands in 1950s Brooklyn, where she falls in love with a local. But when her past catches up with her, she must choose between two countries.

programme.title: Alone in Berlin
programme.desc: In the heart of terror in 1940, two German people resist everyday life and have an extraordinary impact.

programme.title: Stardust (2020)
programme.desc: Meet David before Bowie, one of the greatest icons in music history. But who was the young man behind the many faces?

programme.title: Hurricane
programme.desc: The tale of the Polish pilot who alongside his comrades of the Polish Air Force, joins the British Royal Air Force to fight during the Battle of Britain.

programme.title: Testament of Youth
programme.desc: Based on the World War I memoir by Vera Brittain, the tale of one woman's searing journey from youthful hopes and dreams to the edge of despair and back again.

programme.title: Heartbreak High
programme.desc: Roller-skating Bolton collides with principal Dyson; Con revamps the Shark Pool.

programme.title: Dark Age
programme.desc: An Australian government ranger and two indigenous guides hunt a legendary 25-foot crocodile.

programme.title: Mad Dog Morgan
programme.desc: A marauding bushranger Dan Morgan self-destructs on madness and revenge.

programme.title: The Go-Betweens: Right Here
programme.desc: A heartfelt story uncovering the intensely passionate and fraught relationships that formed one of the most influential bands in Australian rock history.

programme.title: Not Quite Hollywood
programme.desc: Jam packed full of outrageous anecdotes, lessons in maverick filmmaking, a smattering of international names and a genuine, infectious love of Aussie movies.

programme.title: The Right Hand Man
programme.desc: A stagecoach driver goes to work for a dying, one-armed aristocrat in 1860s Australia.

programme.title: Malcolm
programme.desc: Malcolm, a chronically shy mechanical genius who has just been fired for building his own tram, naively helps a pair of bank robbers in a series of outrageous heists.

programme.title: Skippy
programme.desc: A mysterious disease threatens to wipe out all animals in the Waratah National Park, and Skippy is suspected of being the carrier.

programme.title: Ship to Shore
programme.desc: Hermes' Greek heritage catches up with him when he learns his parents had betrothed him to a young girl while he was in the cradle.

programme.title: Heartbreak High
programme.desc: Roller-skating Bolton collides with principal Dyson; Con revamps the Shark Pool.

programme.title: Walkabout
programme.desc: Two young siblings are stranded in the Australian outback and are forced to cope on their own. They meet an Australian boy on walkabout: a ritual separation from his tribe.

programme.title: Storm Boy
programme.desc: Storm Boy lives an idyllic life where the Murray River meets the sea. But, growing up, he is forced to choose between a life of continued isolation and the challenges of the outside world.

programme.title: The Man from Coxs River
programme.desc: Can a quest to save a mob of brumbies in inaccessible wilderness bring a fiercely independent horseman and a ranger enemy to see the world through each other's eyes?

programme.title: Attack Force Z
programme.desc: Australian commandos rescue survivors of a downed aircraft on a Japanese-held island.

programme.title: Skippy
programme.desc: Mark is annoyed when Ranger Hammond insists he spends the day assisting a marine biologist that is visiting the park. He changes his mind once he meets Dr Trout.

programme.title: Ship to Shore
programme.desc: When old Mr. Brinkmann is carted off to a nursing home, two women on the island get Ralph and Sally to close in. They want their love letters back.

programme.title: Heartbreak High
programme.desc: As exchange-student Con is about to head for America, Katerina is resentful.

programme.title: The Highest Honour
programme.desc: The true story of a daring WWII raid on Japanese-occupied Singapore Harbour by Australian and British troops.

programme.title: Careful, He Might Hear You
programme.desc: A young boy becomes a pawn caught in an elaborate web of deceit and torn between two feuding aunts.

programme.title: Test: AUS v Windies: 2000/01 4th Test
programme.desc: Australia holds a commanding 3-0 series lead heading to the Boxing Day Test. Steve Waugh aims for another dominant game against the West Indies, who will look to Brian Lara and Marlon Samuels to ignite a comeback.

programme.title: Test ENG v IND: 1st Test Day 1
programme.desc: A new chapter begins as India, under captain Shubman Gill, takes on England in a five-match series. Both teams will aim to start their World Test Championship cycle strongly with key players like Joe Root and Jasprit Bumrah ready to fire.

programme.title: Test ENG v IND: 1st Test Day 2
programme.desc: India return to English shores following their last visit in 2022, where the series ended in a 2-2 draw. Day two begins.

programme.title: Test ENG v IND: 1st Test Day 3
programme.desc: England have won their last five Test matches at Headingley. Day three of the first Test begins.

programme.title: Test ENG v IND: 1st Test Day 4
programme.desc: Honours are even heading into day four, after India took a six-run lead into their second innings. The tourists will resume on 2/90.

programme.title: Test ENG v IND: 1st Test Day 5
programme.desc: A blockbuster finale awaits in Leeds, with England requiring 350 runs for victory in the first Test against India.

programme.title: Test: AUS v Windies: 1992/93 2nd Test
programme.desc: The summer of 1992/93 ignites as Australia, with its formidable lineup including Allan Border and a young Shane Warne, seeks to assert a dominant win over the West Indies.

programme.title: Test: AUS v Windies: 1992/93 4th Test
programme.desc: A defining Test in Adelaide, as the West Indies, spearheaded by the electrifying Brian Lara and fearsome Curtly Ambrose, battle to try level the series against a resilient Australian side.

programme.title: Test: AUS v Windies: 1996/97 2nd Test
programme.desc: The 1996/97 summer brings a clash of titans as Mark Taylor's Australia, featuring the precision of Glenn McGrath, face a West Indies determined to turn the tide, led by the legendary Courtney Walsh.

programme.title: Test: AUS v Windies: 2000/01 3rd Test
programme.desc: Steve Waugh's dominant Australia push for a series win. Can Brian Lara inspire a West Indies fightback to defy the odds?

programme.title: Test: AUS v Windies: 2009/10 2nd Test
programme.desc: With the series opener in their favour, Australia braces for a West Indies fightback. Can Chris Gayle inspire a turnaround against the formidable Australian attack?

programme.title: Test: AUS v Windies: 2005/06 3rd Test
programme.desc: In 2005, Australia aims to cement its supremacy. But the brilliant Brian Lara sparks a West Indies revival against the in-form Australian batsmen Matthew Hayden and Michael Hussey.

programme.title: Test: AUS v Windies: 2009/10 3rd Test
programme.desc: Australia chases a clean sweep, but the West Indies, with power-hitter Chris Gayle, are eager to defy. Australian all-rounder Shane Watson looks to continue his strong contributions.

programme.title: Test: AUS v Windies: 2022 1st Test
programme.desc: Australia's batting maestros Marnus Labuschagne and Steve Smith prepare for battle against Kraigg Brathwaite's West Indies in the opening 2022 Test.

programme.title: Test: AUS v Windies: 2022 2nd Test
programme.desc: Australia seeks to extend its lead. Marnus Labuschagne's runs have been pivotal, but Kraigg Brathwaite's West Indies are desperate to turn the tide in this crucial encounter.

programme.title: Test: AUS v Windies: 2024 1st Test
programme.desc: Pat Cummins leads Australia into battle against a revitalized West Indies. All eyes are on the electric Shamar Joseph as he aims to make an immediate impact.

programme.title: Test: AUS v Windies: 2024 2nd Test
programme.desc: An extraordinary bowling effort from Shamar Joseph turns the tide for the West Indies at the Gabba. While Pat Cummins' Australia faces pressure in a desperate chase for victory.

programme.title: Test ENG v IND: 1st Test Day 1
programme.desc: A new chapter begins as India, under captain Shubman Gill, takes on England in a five-match series. Both teams will aim to start their World Test Championship cycle strongly with key players like Joe Root and Jasprit Bumrah ready to fire.

programme.desc: India return to English shores following their last visit in 2022, where the series ended in a 2-2 draw. Day two begins.

programme.title: Test ENG v IND: 1st Test Day 4
programme.desc: Honours are even heading into day four, after India took a six-run lead into their second innings. The tourists will resume on 2/90.

programme.desc: Two best friends hiking the Grand Canyon trust a hiking guide to take them on an off trail adventure.

programme.desc: While on a road trip through the desert, Charlie and her boyfriend Aidan break down in the middle of nowhere.

programme.title: Harry and Meghan: Escaping the Palace
programme.desc: The couple decide to step back from the duties of the British monarchy following the birth of their son Archie.

programme.title: Stalked by a Prince
programme.desc: Publicist Alyssa thinks she's in a fairytale when she meets a British prince who whisks her away to Europe. Alyssa's dream turns into a nightmare when the prince refuses to let her leave.

programme.title: Liz & Dick
programme.desc: A chronicle of the fiery, legendary, on-again off-again romance between Hollywood stars Elizabeth Taylor and Richard Burton.

programme.title: Murder Below Deck
programme.desc: When Lauren gives up the corporate life and a cheating boyfriend, she joins her best friend from college working aboard a luxury yacht in the South Pacific.

programme.title: Testament of Youth
programme.desc: Based on the World War I memoir by Vera Brittain, the tale of one woman's searing journey from youthful hopes and dreams to the edge of despair and back again.

programme.title: The Descent
programme.desc: A caving trip goes wrong, trapping a group of women. Stalked by bloodthirsty beasts and turning against each other, they must become as savage as the creatures hunting them.

programme.title: Absolutely Anything
programme.desc: A group of aliens bestow upon a random Earthling the ability to make absolutely anything happen, to see if he uses the power for good or for evil.

programme.title: A United Kingdom
programme.desc: The true story of the King of Bechuanaland, and the London office worker he married despite fierce opposition from the British and South African governments.

programme.title: The Dinosaur Project
programme.desc: In this special effects thriller, a film crew in the Congo discover a lost world filled with terrifying, giant creatures thought extinct for millions of years.

programme.title: Churchill
programme.desc: A ticking-clock thriller following Winston Churchill in the 96 hours before D-day.

programme.title: Stardust (2020)
programme.desc: Meet David before Bowie, one of the greatest icons in music history. But who was the young man behind the many faces?

programme.title: Hurricane
programme.desc: The tale of the Polish pilot who alongside his comrades of the Polish Air Force, joins the British Royal Air Force to fight during the Battle of Britain.

programme.title: Testament of Youth
programme.desc: Based on the World War I memoir by Vera Brittain, the tale of one woman's searing journey from youthful hopes and dreams to the edge of despair and back again.

programme.title: The Best Offer
programme.desc: A master auctioneer becomes obsessed with an extremely reclusive heiress and collector of fine art, who he has never actually met.

programme.title: In Bruges
programme.desc: After a job goes wrong, two hit men are ordered by their crime boss to cool their heels in Bruges. They don't make good tourists and soon find themselves in the oddest of circumstances.

programme.title: Ginger & Rosa
programme.desc: UK. Two rebellious teenage dreamers see their friendship shatter as nuclear terror grips the world in the Cuban missile crisis.

programme.title: Sorry We Missed You
programme.desc: Ricky's family have been fighting against debt since the 2008 financial crash. An opportunity arises to wrestle back some independence, but it's hard work to avoid breaking point.

programme.title: The Falling
programme.desc: As a mysterious fainting epidemic breaks out in a strict English girls' school, best friends Abbie and Lydia refuse to believe that there is nothing wrong, and set out to discover the truth.

programme.title: Ammonite
programme.desc: In 1840s England, acclaimed but overlooked fossil hunter Mary Anning and a young woman sent to convalesce by the sea develop an intense relationship, altering both of their lives forever.

programme.title: Heartbreak High
programme.desc: As exchange-student Con is about to head for America, Katerina is resentful.

programme.title: 13th Floor
programme.desc: An electrocuted boy's ghost sides with two young women against hit men in an office building.

programme.title: The Man from Coxs River
programme.desc: Can a quest to save a mob of brumbies in inaccessible wilderness bring a fiercely independent horseman and a ranger enemy to see the world through each other's eyes?

programme.title: Attack Force Z
programme.desc: Australian commandos rescue survivors of a downed aircraft on a Japanese-held island.

programme.title: Skippy
programme.desc: Mark is annoyed when Ranger Hammond insists he spends the day assisting a marine biologist that is visiting the park. He changes his mind once he meets Dr Trout.

programme.desc: As exchange-student Con is about to head for America, Katerina is resentful.

programme.title: Manganinnie

programme.title: Madagascar: A Little Wild

programme.title: Fifi and the Flowertots
programme.desc: Bumble is practising for his magic show, but he has made the twins disappear! Can Fifi help him find them before the big show?

programme.title: Fifi and the Flowertots

programme.title: Fifi and the Flowertots
programme.desc: Webby is clearing out her web. Fifi takes all the unwanted objects home and uses them to play a brilliant game of shadow puppets, a perfect game to play on a rainy day.
