programme.title: Joyce Meyer: Enjoying Everyday Life
programme.desc: Are you ready to be encouraged and challenged to reach new levels in God? Would you like to be a more effective Christian in your busy world? Then Joyce Meyer's common sense approach to powerfully living the Christian life is for you.

programme.title: When Calls the Heart
programme.desc: Elizabeth and Nathan help Tom out of a tight situation, and the town comes together after a setback. With encouragement from family, Joseph heals an old rift. Gowen counsels Lucas.

programme.title: Bible Land Passages
programme.sub-title: The Ministry of Jesus in Northern Israel
programme.desc: Read about places like Beersheba, Jericho, Jerusalem, Caesarea, and cities surrounding the Sea of Galilee, and discover that those places exist just as the Bible describes.

programme.title: Hour of Power
programme.desc: Pastor Bobby Schuller provides spiritual principles and practices that can help people become happy students of Jesus and live a life of meaning believing there is no fuller, richer life than the one that is lived in Christ.

programme.title: Impact for Life
programme.sub-title: Don't Lose Sight of The Ark
programme.desc: Pastor Bev Mortlock preaches on what it is to not lose sight of the Ark and to leave our limitation at the cross. Because of this, we are able to move forward without any limitation or restriction on our lives.

programme.title: Answers with Bayless Conley
programme.sub-title: They Had Been with Jesus (Harrison Conley)
programme.desc: In his powerful message They Had Been with Jesus, Pastor Harrison Conley reflects on the apostle Peter's remarkable transformation and reveals how genuine encounters with Christ transform.

programme.title: PowerPoint with Jack Graham
programme.desc: PowerPoint Ministries started as a vision of Dr Jack Graham 20 years ago with a vision to glorify God by introducing Jesus Christ as Lord to as many people as possible and to develop them in Christian living.

programme.title: The Catholic Guy
programme.desc: Bruce Downes is The Catholic Guy. No matter your age, situation or background, be prepared to laugh, learn and listen to what God is trying to say to you. Wherever you matter where you are around the world today, God is never far from you.

programme.title: New Creation Church
programme.desc: Pastor Joseph Prince preaches dynamic messages centred on the pure gospel of the grace of God. His desire is to help believers understand grace and how greatly blessed, highly favoured and deeply loved they are by their heavenly Father.

programme.title: New Horizons
programme.sub-title: Life Hacks: Pocket tips from the Book of Proverbs Pt6
programme.desc: Marc explores the wisdom of the Book of Proverbs looking at the wisdom that God has provided, so that we can observe it and put it into practice in our day to day lives.

programme.title: Faith Runs Deep
programme.desc: In this new program from the producers of the award-winning series, Jesus the Game Changer, host Karl Faase travels around Australia in an iconic Holden ute, discovering a rich and inspiring history of faith.

programme.title: Jeni: Seeking the Extraordinary
programme.desc: Jeni and Casey are back this time road-tripping around the Pacific North West, seeing the sights, and meeting extraordinary people along the way.

programme.title: Be That
programme.desc: Blended and stepfamilies make up around 1 in 10 families. They face unique challenges that often lead to conflict. So when Rachel's relationship with Steven became more serious, they had to navigate blending a family.

programme.title: Elevation Experience
programme.desc: The Elevation Experience with Pastor Steven Furtick features inspirational and challenging messages from Pastor Steven as well as original worship music from Elevation Church in Charlotte, North Carolina.

programme.title: Life with Paul De Jong
programme.desc: We like to call it 'soul food'. LIFE TV uses creative illustration, real life stories and biblical teaching to encourage and help viewers discover a greater purpose to their lives.

programme.title: Drive Thru History
programme.desc: Dave Stotts explores the amazing lives of the very first Christians. Using the Book of Acts as a roadmap, Dave travels the Mediterranean region to share the people, places and events that launched the faith.

programme.title: Joyce Meyer: Enjoying Everyday Life
programme.desc: Are you ready to be encouraged and challenged to reach new levels in God? Would you like to be a more effective Christian in your busy world? Then Joyce Meyer's common sense approach to powerfully living the Christian life is for you.

programme.title: When Calls the Heart
programme.desc: Elizabeth and Nathan help Tom out of a tight situation, and the town comes together after a setback. With encouragement from family, Joseph heals an old rift. Gowen counsels Lucas.

programme.title: Welcome to Hope
programme.desc: John and Abe's relationship reaches a tipping point, so John starts looking for a new job and a place to live.

programme.title: Behind the Sash
programme.desc: Its the Mrs Australia Official Final... an event that you won't expect.

programme.title: Dot Conner: Webtective
programme.desc: Follows an inquisitive young teenager as she investigates questions about faith as if she is a detective solving a mystery. Dot's cases unfold through the lens of social media and technology.

programme.title: Owlegories
programme.desc: Owlegories is an animated series that follows a group of student owls as they travel on adventures learning about nature, faith, and God!

programme.title: Superbook
programme.desc: This program teaches children timeless moral truths and life lessons through the captivating, Bible-based adventures of two time-traveling children and their robot friend, Gizmo.

programme.title: Friends and Heroes
programme.desc: Friends and Heroes is an animated children's adventure based in Ancient Egypt, Israel and Rome. The story follows two young friends Macky and Portia as they fight for justice against the Roman Empire.

programme.title: Jentezen Franklin
programme.desc: New York Times bestselling author, Pastor Jentezen Franklin, brings practical meaning to spiritual truths found in God's Word. Kingdom Connection is the teaching ministry of Free Chapel, a multi-campus church with a global ministry.

programme.title: Centuries Collide
programme.desc: Millions of people every year celebrate St Patrick's day with parades, parties and green beer, but what does all this have to do with the celebration of a SAINT?

programme.title: View & Chew
programme.desc: Donut holes and chili bowls are the star of the show when Mike takes a trip to the nation's capital; Mike talks about DC's secret passageways and ends up finding some of his own in a spooky mansion.

programme.title: Be Great. Do Good
programme.desc: Not every measure of the health of a business has a line on the profit and loss sheet. It permeates and impacts on every area of businesses and a bad culture left untreated will impact the bottom line.

programme.title: A Cathedral Pilgrimage
programme.desc: A Pilgrimage through Britain's Great Cathedrals explores cathedrals & abbeys found throughout England & Wales, featuring interviews with historians & experts & breathtaking footage.

programme.title: The Good Road
programme.desc: Virginia is in a state of struggle between the past and present. Balance in nature and balance in community requires people of all backgrounds, ethnicities and tribes.

programme.title: A Moment in History
programme.desc: Join host Seth Udinski as he explores the most pivotal moments in history and the Bible, providing insight into the events that have shaped our world.

programme.title: Katherine Ruonala Ministries
programme.desc: Katherine Ruonala shares a practical message of love and hope to the nations.

programme.title: Joyce Meyer: Enjoying Everyday Life
programme.desc: Are you ready to be encouraged and challenged to reach new levels in God? Would you like to be a more effective Christian in your busy world? Then Joyce Meyer's common sense approach to powerfully living the Christian life is for you.

programme.title: Night Swim
programme.desc: Former baseball player Ray Waller moves into a new home with his family. But a dark secret in the home's past will unleash a malevolent force that will drag the family into the depths of terror.

programme.title: Hypnotic
programme.desc: Determined to find his missing daughter, Austin detective Danny Rourke finds himself spiralling down a rabbit hole while investigating a series of reality-bending bank robberies.

programme.title: Smile 2
programme.desc: As global pop star Skye Riley preps for a world tour, she faces terrifying events and the pressures of fame, pushing her to confront her haunting past.

programme.title: Dune: Part Two
programme.desc: Paul unites with Chani and the Fremen to seek revenge. Facing a choice between the love of his life and the fate of the universe, he must prevent a terrible future only he can foresee.

programme.title: Harold and the Purple Crayon
programme.desc: Harold can bring anything in his book to life by drawing it. When he grows up and steps out of the book and into the real world, he realises he has much to learn.

programme.title: The Critic
programme.desc: A powerful London theatre critic lures a struggling actress into a blackmail scheme that has deadly consequences.

programme.title: Origin
programme.desc: Author Isabel Wilkerson writes her seminal book, Caste: The Origins of Our Discontents, while coping with personal tragedy.

programme.title: Freud's Last Session
programme.desc: On the eve of World War II, Sigmund Freud and C S Lewis gather to discuss the existence of God and the future of mankind.

programme.title: The Holdovers
programme.desc: A curmudgeonly instructor at a prep school is forced to remain on campus during Christmas break to babysit a handful of students with nowhere to go.

programme.title: The Three Musketeers: D'artagnan
programme.desc: France. D'Artagnan arrives in Paris trying to find his attackers after being left for dead, which leads him to a real war where the future of France is at stake.

programme.title: The Three Musketeers - Part II: Milady
programme.desc: Constance Bonacieux is kidnapped before D'Artagnan's very eyes. The young musketeer, aided by Athos, Porthos and Aramis, is forced to join the mysterious Milady de Winter.

programme.title: Jeanne Du Barry
programme.desc: The life of Jeanne Becu, who was born as the illegitimate daughter of a seamstress in 1743 and went on to rise through the Court of Louis XV to become his last official mistress.

programme.title: Wonka
programme.desc: A young Willy Wonka, chock-full of ideas and determined to change the world one bite at a time, proves that the best things in life begin with a dream.

programme.title: Pitch Perfect
programme.desc: Beca, a freshman at her new college, finds herself muscled into a clique whose only thing in common is how good they sound when they sing together in perfect harmony in this laugh-out-loud comedy.

programme.title: Pitch Perfect 2
programme.desc: Beca, Fat Amy and the Barden Bellas are back to pitch slap the world. After a scandal threatens to derail their last year at Barden, they worry that they've lost their harmony for good.

programme.title: Pitch Perfect 3
programme.desc: After the highs of winning the World Champs, the Bellas found themselves split apart and jobless. But when they get their chance for one last tour, they come together again.

programme.title: Bob Marley: One Love
programme.desc: Celebrates the life of an icon who inspires generations. In this uplifting film, discover Bob Marley's story of overcoming adversity and the journey behind his revolutionary music that change the world.

programme.title: The Prince of Egypt
programme.desc: This is the extraordinary tale of two brothers, one born of royal blood, one an orphan with a secret past. Their final confrontation will forever change their lives - and the world.

programme.title: Mamma Mia!
programme.desc: Sophie has just one wish to make her wedding perfect: to have her father walk her down the aisle. Now she just has to find out who he is.

programme.title: Mamma Mia! Here We Go Again
programme.desc: A decade after Mamma Mia! sang and danced its way into the hearts of audiences around the world, the original cast are back.

programme.title: Sound of Metal
programme.desc: When ex-addict Ruben unexpectedly loses his hearing his life is thrown into turmoil. In a group home for Deaf addicts, he must choose between his new community and the life of sound he left behind.

programme.title: Sing
programme.desc: A dapper koala who has fallen on hard times has one final chance to restore his crumbling theatre by producing the world's greatest singing competition.

programme.title: Blues Brothers 2000
programme.desc: Sequel to the 1980 cult classic, Jake and Elwood must reunite the old band, with a few new members, and go on another "Mission from God".

programme.title: The Color Purple
programme.desc: Torn from her sister Nettie and her children, Celie faces many hardships in her life, including an abusive husband. Celie finds strength in the unbreakable bonds of sisterhood.

programme.title: Bee Gees: Broken Heart
programme.desc: An exploration of the history of the Bee Gees, featuring revealing interviews with oldest brother Barry Gibb, and archival interviews with the late twin brothers Robin and Maurice.

programme.title: Yesterday
programme.desc: After a freak accident, struggling singer-songwriter Jack realises he's the only person on Earth who remembers The Beatles. Performing their classics, he skyrockets to fame.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: When the evil wizard Gargamel chases the tiny blue Smurfs out of their village, they tumble from their magical world into New York City.

programme.title: Turbo
programme.desc: A snail that has forever dreamed of the ability to move fast is granted his wish after a freak accident. Now he's out to win the Indy 500.

programme.title: Scoob!
programme.desc: With hundreds of cases solved and adventures shared, Scooby and the gang face their most challenging mystery ever: a plot to unleash the ghost dog Cerberus upon the world.

programme.title: Dinosaur Train: Adventure Island
programme.desc: Dinosaur siblings Buddy, Tiny, Shiny and Don try to reunite with their parents after an earthquake causes theme park robots to go rogue.

programme.title: Bee Movie
programme.desc: A bee is abuzz over a scandal: people are stealing honey to eat. With the help of a florist, he sues the human race for 'honey laundering'.

programme.title: Hook
programme.desc: A lawyer who has lost any memory that he was once the legendary Peter Pan must travel to Neverland, aided by Tinker Bell, to rescue his children from his nemesis, Captain Hook.

programme.title: The Angry Birds Movie
programme.desc: When an island populated by happy, flightless birds is visited by mysterious outsiders, it is up to two unlikely outcasts, and birds with temper problems, to set things right.

programme.title: The Angry Birds Movie 2
programme.desc: To save their islands, the flightless angry birds and the scheming green piggies take their beef to the next level.

programme.title: Jumanji: Welcome to the Jungle
programme.desc: Four high school kids discover an old video game console and are immediately drawn into the game's jungle setting, learning you don't just play Jumanji, you must survive it.

programme.title: Pixels
programme.desc: When aliens discover video feeds of classic arcade games and misinterpret them as a declaration of war, they attack the Earth, using the video games as models for their assaults.

programme.title: Home
programme.desc: When a cute alien lands on Earth and finds himself on the run from his own race, he forms an unlikely friendship with a brave little girl who's on a quest of her own.

programme.title: Shrek
programme.desc: An ogre, with the help of an annoying donkey, tries to win back his swamp by returning a princess to a scheming lord.

programme.title: Shaun the Sheep Movie
programme.desc: It's up to the most rascally sheep in England to bring the flock home when a caravan and a very steep hill lead them all to the big city.

programme.title: Dragonheart: Vengeance
programme.desc: After his family is killed, Lukas sets out on an epic quest for revenge, forming an unlikely trio with an ice breathing dragon and a swashbuckling mercenary.

programme.title: The Smurfs 2
programme.desc: When evil Gargamel kidnaps Smurfette, the Smurfs and their human friends led by Patrick unite to help her escape the clutches of the Naughties.

programme.title: Sucker Punch
programme.desc: A young woman incarcerated in a psychiatric institution against her will creates a fantastical world within her imagination to help her and four other inmates escape from a frightening fate.

programme.title: Batman v Superman: Dawn of Justice
programme.desc: Fearing that the actions of the Man of Steel are left unchecked, Batman takes on Superman, while the world wrestles with what kind of a hero it really needs.

programme.title: Passengers
programme.desc: A spacecraft transporting thousands of people to a distant planet has a malfunction in its sleep chambers, and as a result two passengers are awakened 90 years too early.

programme.title: The Mummy (1999)
programme.desc: Archaeologists awaken an Egyptian priest mummified alive 36 centuries ago for killing Pharaoh Seti and sleeping with his mistress. When he escapes from the tomb, he becomes a threat to the world.

programme.title: The Dark Knight Rises
programme.desc: It has been years since Batman vanished into the night, turning from hero to fugitive. Everything will change with the arrival of a cunning cat burglar, and the emergence of masked terrorist, Bane.

programme.title: Fast & Furious 7
programme.desc: The lead-footed crew reunites in this turbo-fuelled tale of the vengeful brother of an international terrorist who sets his bloody sights on the boy racers that took his sibling down.

programme.title: Transformers: Revenge of the Fallen
programme.desc: When college-bound Sam Witwicky learns the truth about the ancient origins of the Transformers, he must accept his destiny and join Optimus Prime and Bumblebee in their epic battle.

programme.title: Doom
programme.desc: A frantic call for help from a remote research station on Mars sends a team of mercenary Marines into action.

programme.title: Pacific Rim: Uprising
programme.desc: Jake, a once-promising Jaeger pilot, has given up his training only to be caught up in a criminal underworld. He's given one last chance when an unstoppable threat is unleashed.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: A battle between two alien robot clans, the Autobots and the Decepticons, is reignited on Earth, with a teenage boy being the only one who holds the power to stop it.

programme.title: Battleship
programme.desc: Based on the classic Hasbro naval combat game, this is the story of an international fleet of ships that come across an alien armada while on a naval war games exercise.

programme.title: Machete
programme.desc: Left for dead after clashing with notorious Mexican drug kingpin Torrez, Machete escapes to Texas, looking to disappear and forget his tragic past. What he finds is a web of corruption and deceit.

programme.title: Ghostbusters
programme.desc: Armed with proton packs and a new range of kick-ass weapons, the Ghostbusters battle to save the city from an uprising of mischievous ghouls.

programme.title: Couples Retreat
programme.desc: Four bickering couples embark on a journey to a tropical island resort. While one of the couples is there to work on their marriage, the other three set out to enjoy some fun in the sun.

programme.title: Knocked Up
programme.desc: A one-night stand between a mismatched slacker and a career girl results in a pregnancy that leads to unlikely mutual support.

programme.title: The House Bunny
programme.desc: When a bunny is evicted from the Playboy mansion, she hops into the dying Zeta sorority house. Her tutorials in sexy charm make the girls more popular than ever.

programme.title: Shaun of the Dead
programme.desc: An apocalyptic zombie uprising gives Shaun and his mates a night from hell when they meet at the local pub and find themselves fighting off hordes of the brain-hungry undead in this horror comedy.

programme.title: Galaxy Quest
programme.desc: The alumni cast of a cult space TV show have to play their roles as the real thing when an alien race needs their help.

programme.title: Zombieland
programme.desc: The most frightened guy on Earth leads a motley crew of survivors in a world overrun by zombies.

programme.title: Bean
programme.desc: Mr Bean is a London museum guard sent to Los Angeles in charge of a priceless painting. Mayhem erupts when the famously eccentric simpleton is mistaken for an art expert.

programme.title: I Now Pronounce You Chuck & Larry
programme.desc: Two firefighters become domestic partners and must carry the masquerade to extremes when an overzealous bureaucrat becomes suspicious of their true relationship.

programme.title: Ace Ventura: Pet Detective
programme.desc: A goofy pet detective is hired to track down Snowflake, the Miami Dolphins' mascot.

programme.title: Police Academy 2: First Assignment
programme.desc: The team of bungling recruits have finally graduated and are let loose on an unsuspecting public as they take on their first cases.

programme.title: Pitch Perfect
programme.desc: Beca, a freshman at her new college, finds herself muscled into a clique whose only thing in common is how good they sound when they sing together in perfect harmony in this laugh-out-loud comedy.

programme.title: Pitch Perfect 2
programme.desc: Beca, Fat Amy and the Barden Bellas are back to pitch slap the world. After a scandal threatens to derail their last year at Barden, they worry that they've lost their harmony for good.

programme.title: Pitch Perfect 3
programme.desc: After the highs of winning the World Champs, the Bellas found themselves split apart and jobless. But when they get their chance for one last tour, they come together again.

programme.title: Bean
programme.desc: Mr Bean is a London museum guard sent to Los Angeles in charge of a priceless painting. Mayhem erupts when the famously eccentric simpleton is mistaken for an art expert.

programme.title: Friends with Benefits
programme.desc: Two best friends coming out of disastrous relationships, decide to make a 'friends with benefits' pact. However, soon they begin to fall in love and must re-evaluate their feelings for each other.

programme.title: The Ugly Truth
programme.desc: A hopelessly single TV producer is in for a rude awakening when a chauvinistic shock jock takes over as host of her poorly rating show.

programme.title: Mona Lisa Smile
programme.desc: A free-thinking art professor teaches conservative 1950s Wellesley girls to question their traditional societal roles, encouraging them to be more interested in a career than nabbing a good husband.

programme.title: Clueless
programme.desc: So you think you don't have a clue? Join the club, as high-schoolers Cher and Dionne's plan to transform a lonely misfit into a total babe backfires in the worst possible way.

programme.title: Mean Girls
programme.desc: A home-schooled newcomer is introduced to the blackboard jungle, where she joins the social outcasts in a planned sabotage of the cool kids.

programme.title: Georgia Rule
programme.desc: In this heart-warming story, Georgia is a woman who lives by her own rules and she expects her rebellious granddaughter, to do the same - no is not an option.

programme.title: Stepmom
programme.desc: When tragedy strikes, two strong-willed and independent women must put aside their differences and resentments to unite a family in crisis.

programme.title: The Change-Up
programme.desc: In this switching places comedy, two best friends wake up in each other's bodies after a drunken night, and become very alarmed with the outcome.

programme.title: The Intern
programme.desc: After discovering that retirement isn't all it's cracked up to be, a 70-year-old widower seizes an opportunity to become a senior intern at an online fashion site.

programme.title: The Bodyguard
programme.desc: A bodyguard is sent to protect a pop-music diva from a homicidal fan. At first repelled by each other, passion ignites as danger explodes around them.

programme.title: Top Gun
programme.desc: A pilot is selected to attend the Top Gun Naval Flying School while also pursuing a relationship with an instructor.

programme.title: Jerry Maguire
programme.desc: A sports agent suddenly discovers his scruples and promptly loses his job. But with the help of one loyal colleague and one outrageous client, he learns that loving well is the best revenge.

programme.title: Eyes Wide Shut
programme.desc: A doctor enters a secret world of sex play that threatens his life and marriage after his wife admits to fantasies about another man.

programme.title: Rocketman
programme.desc: The story of Elton John's life, from his years as a prodigy at the Royal Academy of Music, through his influential and enduring musical partnership with Bernie Taupin.

programme.title: Sleepers
programme.desc: In a tale of innocence lost and vengeance unleashed, four men plot retribution over their mistreatment in a violent reform school as boys.

programme.title: Saving Private Ryan
programme.desc: Following the Normandy landings, a group of US soldiers go behind enemy lines to retrieve a paratrooper whose brothers have been killed in action.

programme.title: Donnie Brasco
programme.desc: An FBI undercover agent infiltrates the mob and finds himself identifying more with the mafia life to the expense of his regular one.

programme.title: Children of Men
programme.desc: It's 2027. There have been no births for 18 years. Humanity is doomed. Then Clive Owen discovers the key to survival, but can he protect his precious cargo?

programme.title: Rocketman
programme.desc: The story of Elton John's life, from his years as a prodigy at the Royal Academy of Music, through his influential and enduring musical partnership with Bernie Taupin.

programme.title: Conspiracy Theory
programme.desc: A crackpot New York cabbie lands in trouble after his conspiracy magazine attracts the interest of shady government heavies and leads to five unexplained murders.

programme.title: Angels & Demons
programme.desc: When Langdon discovers evidence of the resurgence of an ancient secret brotherhood, he also faces a deadly threat to the existence of the organisation's most despised enemy: the Catholic Church.

programme.title: Cape Fear
programme.desc: Fourteen years after being imprisoned, vicious psychopath Max Cady emerges with a single-minded mission: to seek revenge on his attorney Sam Bowden.

programme.title: Jason Bourne
programme.desc: The CIA's most dangerous former operative is drawn out of hiding to uncover more explosive truths about his past.

programme.title: Takers
programme.desc: A criminal gang attempt one last job with more money at stake than ever. But their plans are interrupted by a detective, hell-bent on solving the case.

programme.title: RocknRolla
programme.desc: A story of sex, thugs and rock 'n' roll. London is ground zero for the changing times with mobsters from the East and criminals from the streets all vying to change the rules.

programme.title: Conspiracy Theory
programme.desc: A crackpot New York cabbie lands in trouble after his conspiracy magazine attracts the interest of shady government heavies and leads to five unexplained murders.

programme.title: Close Encounters of the Third Kind
programme.desc: After an encounter with UFOs, a line worker feels undeniably drawn to an isolated area in the wilderness where something spectacular is about to happen.

programme.title: Frantic
programme.desc: In a hotel room in Paris, a doctor comes out of the shower and finds that his wife has disappeared. He soon finds himself caught up in a world of intrigue, espionage, gangsters, drugs and murder.

programme.title: Legends of the Fall
programme.desc: When the sons of a cavalry colonel set out to fight a war in Europe, suspicion and jealousy threaten to tear apart their once indestructible bond when the sexy Susanna enters their lives.

programme.title: Last Action Hero
programme.desc: A magic movie ticket transports a young fan onto the screen with his action hero, but things blow up when a notorious movie villain uses the ticket to break into the real world.

programme.title: Innerspace
programme.desc: A test pilot is miniaturised in a secret experiment, and accidentally injected into a hapless store clerk.

programme.title: E.T. the Extra-Terrestrial
programme.desc: An extraterrestrial finds a friend in 10-year-old Elliot, while members of a task force work day and night to track down the whereabouts of Earth's first visitor from outer space.

programme.title: Close Encounters of the Third Kind
programme.desc: After an encounter with UFOs, a line worker feels undeniably drawn to an isolated area in the wilderness where something spectacular is about to happen.

programme.title: Beverly Hills Cop III
programme.desc: For the third time, Detroit cop Axel Foley returns to Beverly Hills, this time to track down bad guys at an amusement park.

programme.title: Wayne's World
programme.desc: Wayne and Garth host the biggest show on local public access TV. Now a sleazy network executive wants to produce a big-budget version. With the help of Wayne's girlfriend, they must battle to save the show.

programme.title: The Nutty Professor
programme.desc: A morbidly obese professor becomes a Casanova when he takes a miracle weight-loss potion.

programme.title: Jaws
programme.desc: The thriller that scared movie fans everywhere out of the water. Three men undertake a perilous journey to hunt down a great white killer shark.

programme.title: Mercury Rising
programme.desc: An orphaned autistic savant who deciphers a government code in a magazine triggers a national security alarm that makes him an assassin's target.

programme.title: Mad Max 2: The Road Warrior
programme.desc: Max drives the roads of outback Australia in an unending search for gasoline. Arrayed against him and the other defenders of a fuel depot are the bizarre warriors commanded by the Humungus.

programme.title: Beverly Hills Cop III
programme.desc: For the third time, Detroit cop Axel Foley returns to Beverly Hills, this time to track down bad guys at an amusement park.

programme.title: Murder Below Deck
programme.desc: When Lauren gives up the corporate life and a cheating boyfriend, she joins her best friend from college working aboard a luxury yacht in the South Pacific.

programme.title: Petals on the Wind
programme.desc: A decade after Cathy, Christopher, and Carrie escaped from their grandparents' attic, the family attempt to put their past behind them, but soon discover certain secrets can't be left behind.

programme.title: Beaches
programme.desc: The serendipitous meeting of two young girls on the Venice Boardwalk, who, although worlds apart in lifestyle, embark on an unexpected and lifelong friendship.

programme.title: You Can't Take My Daughter
programme.desc: Amy is a law student in Charlotte who is attacked and raped by Demetri, a friend of a friend. Discovering that she is pregnant from the rape, Amy makes a difficult decision to keep the baby.

programme.title: Expecting Amish
programme.desc: When an eventful Rumspringa leads to an unintended pregnancy, Amish teen Hannah must choose between returning to faith and family or beginning a new life elsewhere.

programme.title: V.C Andrews' Pearl In The Mist
programme.desc: Fate whisked Ruby from a simple life in the Louisiana bayou. But her new riches bring more treachery than happiness.

programme.title: Lust: A Seven Deadly Sins Story
programme.desc: Tiffanie is about to have the wedding of her dreams to her soul mate Damon. But when Damon's old friend Trey arrives, fresh from prison, to be Damon's best man, Tiffanie's whole world is rocked.

programme.title: Girl in the Basement
programme.desc: Sara, a vibrant teen, was looking forward to her 18th birthday so she could move away from her controlling father. But before she could even blow out the candles, her world became extremely dark.

programme.title: The Beach House Murders
programme.desc: A lonely female novelist becomes a prime suspect in a homicide after a one-night tryst with a mysterious stranger who turns up dead at her summer home.

programme.title: You Better Watch Out
programme.desc: A woman stumbles into the middle of a kidnapping while stranded at a small-town airport on Christmas Eve.

programme.title: V.C. Andrews' Hidden Jewel
programme.desc: Ruby struggles to find a happy life with Beau Andreas, the true father of Pearl, and to protect their daughter. Sheltered from sorrow, Pearl thrives in the sunshine of a loving home.

programme.title: Hunt for the Labyrinth Killer
programme.desc: An ace ADA works with a driven cop to catch Daedalus, a serial killer infamous for luring his victims to their deaths with elaborate traps.

programme.title: A Kidnapping in Amish Country
programme.desc: When an Amish woman discovers her daughter has been kidnapped, she turns to the only person who can help her estranged best friend, who has left the Amish way of life.

programme.title: Stalked by My Amish Boyfriend
programme.desc: Carly develops a relationship with Abram, a young Amish man. Their seemingly innocent courtship soon takes a dark turn when Abram refuses to return home.

programme.title: Murdaugh Murders: Part 1
programme.desc: Alex Murdoch's family's hidden crimes begin piling up as he attempts to conceal his own financial felonies but falls into a dark spiral.

programme.title: Murdaugh Murders: Part 2
programme.desc: Police rush to the Murdaugh home after Alex Murdaugh reports his wife, Maggie, and son Paul dead. With police and press digging into Alex's life for leads, he attempts to derail their investigation.

programme.title: Dying to Win
programme.desc: A gymnast gets caught in a web of lies when her mother and stepfather are found murdered in the family home.

programme.title: Ammonite
programme.desc: In 1840s England, acclaimed but overlooked fossil hunter Mary Anning and a young woman sent to convalesce by the sea develop an intense relationship, altering both of their lives forever.

programme.title: Dom Hemingway
programme.desc: Dom Hemingway is a larger-than-life safecracker with a loose fuse. Back on the streets of London after twelve years in prison, it's time to collect what he's owed for keeping his mouth shut.

programme.title: The Unlikely Pilgrimage of Harold Fry
programme.desc: Harold is an ordinary man who has passed through life, living on the side lines, until he goes to post a letter one day and just keeps walking.

programme.title: Six Minutes to Midnight
programme.desc: Seventeen days before WWII, a teacher must try to exonerate himself in time to save the hearts and minds of his students from the grip of Hitler.

programme.title: The Seagull
programme.desc: A fading actress, a fresh-faced ingenue, a famous writer and a failing playwright all come up against one another while visiting a country estate.

programme.title: Ginger & Rosa
programme.desc: UK. Two rebellious teenage dreamers see their friendship shatter as nuclear terror grips the world in the Cuban missile crisis.

programme.title: Sorry We Missed You
programme.desc: Ricky's family have been fighting against debt since the 2008 financial crash. An opportunity arises to wrestle back some independence, but it's hard work to avoid breaking point.

programme.title: The Falling
programme.desc: As a mysterious fainting epidemic breaks out in a strict English girls' school, best friends Abbie and Lydia refuse to believe that there is nothing wrong, and set out to discover the truth.

programme.title: To Olivia
programme.desc: Set between New York, England and Los Angeles, a chronicle of Dahl's struggles while writing some of his most famous works and Neal's return to acting and winning an Oscar.

programme.title: Death Defying Acts
programme.desc: Houdini starts an affair with a psychic out to con the famous escapologist. As the stakes get higher, it soon becomes a question of who is out-conning who.

programme.title: What We Did on Our Holiday
programme.desc: Doug and Abi take their three children on a trip to Scotland for a big family gathering. They are in the midst of a difficult divorce, and have asked the kids to keep it a secret from their family.

programme.title: Bend It Like Beckham
programme.desc: An Indian girl born in England disobeys her strict family in search of a dream: becoming a soccer star like her idol, David Beckham.

programme.title: Cheerful Weather for the Wedding
programme.desc: Dolly is in turmoil when her old lover appears on her wedding day. Does she run away with him or choose a humdrum husband? Astute comedy about family foibles.

programme.title: Slumber
programme.desc: Alice is a sleep doctor, haunted by the nocturnal death of her brother. While examining a family with sleep problems, she is forced to accept they're being terrorised by a demon.

programme.title: Raging Grace
programme.desc: An undocumented Filipino immigrant takes a job as a caretaker for a terminally ill man in a lavish home, securing a better future for her family, but a dark discovery threatens to destroy everything.

programme.title: Heartbreak High
programme.desc: A new student arrives with a bad reputation; Katerina learns about discipline.

programme.title: Marsupials: The Howling III
programme.desc: A female werewolf runs away from her family and falls in love with a man who works in the movie business, while a sociologist searches for proof of the werewolves' existence.

programme.title: Walkabout to Hollywood
programme.desc: Exploring an Australian Aboriginal man's work to bridge the gap between his life as a film and television actor to his native cultural roots.

programme.title: Mr. Reliable
programme.desc: A small-time crook Wally Mellish in this bizarre, true story where police think Wally has his wife and child as hostages, and he relishes the media circus.

programme.title: Nightmares
programme.desc: A little girl tries to stop her mother from fooling around with a man in a car.

programme.title: Playing Beatie Bow
programme.desc: An Australian girl goes back in time to 1873 and meets the family of a child for whom a children's game will one day be named.

programme.title: Dingo
programme.desc: Years after meeting a jazzman in Australia, an outback trumpeter goes to Paris and meets him again.

programme.title: Skippy
programme.desc: Clarissa "Clancy" Merrick arrives at the Waratah National Park to board with the Hammonds, but soon gets into trouble.

programme.title: Ship to Shore

programme.title: Heartbreak High
programme.desc: A new student arrives with a bad reputation; Katerina learns about discipline.

programme.title: Spotswood
programme.desc: An expert on productivity shows wacky workers in 1966 Australia how to run their moccasin factory like clockwork, despite laying off more than half the workforce.

programme.title: The Big Steal

programme.title: Careful, He Might Hear You
programme.desc: A young boy becomes a pawn caught in an elaborate web of deceit and torn between two feuding aunts.

programme.desc: Performing here in front of a huge crowd at Boggo Road Jail in 1993, the band delivers a thumping set of seminal Oz rock, rolling out all their big hits.

programme.title: Skippy
programme.desc: Clancy borrows Dr Steiner's camera but gets into trouble taking photos down by the river. The boys race to rescue her before the tide comes in.

programme.title: Ship to Shore
programme.desc: Julie suspects her aunt's old boyfriend of only being interested in her money while Hermes is on the look-out for foreign operatives posing as day trippers.

programme.title: Heartbreak High

programme.desc: Bodgy Creek is a struggling town. The drought won't let up, jobs are scarce, and the footy team looks like it will have to merge with another club or fold.

programme.desc: The team races to the rescue in the aftermath of an ATV accident; romantic tensions are high between Em and Will as well as Kainalu and Hina.

programme.title: Rescue: HI-Surf
programme.desc: Captain Sonny Jennings and his lifeguards patrol Hawaii's treacherous waters while new recruits vie for a spot on the team. Sonny mourns his nephew, and Em reveals a past romance with Will.

programme.title: Rescue: HI-Surf
programme.desc: A flash flood sweeps a young tourist away from her family and out to deep sea; going against Sonny's wishes, Em takes a bold risk and places her own life in danger in hopes of rescuing the tourist.

programme.title: Rescue: HI-Surf
programme.desc: Em strives to gain her team's respect while managing beach emergencies with Hina and Kainalu. Will's fiancee visits, and Sonny confides in a former lifeguard about his grief over his nephew.

programme.title: Rescue: HI-Surf
programme.desc: College kids get trapped in a collapsed sandpit; Sonny, Will and Laka race to rescue people stranded after a shark attack; Will learns if he made the cut for the firefighter job he has been pursuing.

programme.title: Rescue: HI-Surf
programme.desc: The North Shore lifeguards face the fiercest ocean conditions in years. Sonny names Laka acting lieutenant, while Kainalu deals with pressure from his father to abandon his shift for a campaign.

programme.title: Rescue: HI-Surf
programme.desc: The North Shore community come together for Rocky's paddle out; Hina thinks about switching districts; Laka, Will and Kainalu try to save a beachgoer who accidentally spear his own foot.

programme.title: Rescue: HI-Surf
programme.desc: An influencer gets swept into the ocean while trying to film a new video; Kainalu and Hina discuss setting boundaries within their home; Mayor Emerson makes good on his word with Captain Sonny.

programme.title: Rescue: HI-Surf
programme.desc: Sonny, Em, Will and Laka look for missing paragliders that were pushed into the ocean by a down draft; Kainalu invites Hina to a party with his ex-girlfriend.

programme.desc: More epic action and intrigue as Po and the Dragon Knights continue their quest to destroy the Tianshang weapons, but find themselves in treacherous waters when they are captured by pirates.

programme.title: Dragons: The Nine Realms
programme.desc: Tom and the riders go in search of Thunder, and must face a gauntlet of dangerous dragons to find their lost friend. Along the way, Tom reveals his big secret to D'Angelo and Alex.

programme.title: Fast & Furious: Spy Racers
programme.desc: The Spy Racers learn from Ms Nowhere about Incineration Day, an agency holiday, where spy tech is destroyed in a fun, safe, stress-relieving explosion.

programme.title: Jurassic World: Camp Cretaceous
programme.desc: With their T-rex down, the kids are at a disadvantage against Daniel in the battle for Mantah Corps Island. Will the kids fend off Daniel, or give in, allowing him to put more dinosaurs under human control?

programme.title: Jurassic World: Camp Cretaceous
programme.desc: Dino-nerd Darius and five other campers are chosen for a once-in-a-lifetime experience at Camp Cretaceous. Darius, Kenji and Brooklynn break curfew to sneak into the Compy pen.

programme.title: Boss Baby: Back In Business
programme.desc: Boss takes a special formula that will turn him into a regular baby, long enough to pass a doctor's check-up. However, with Boss gone, lots of villains strike Baby Corp, leaving Staci to hold them off.

programme.title: Spirit Riding Free
programme.desc: Lucky enlists Abigail, Turo, Snips and their horses to help plan a surprise birthday party for Pru - that goes disastrously wrong.

programme.title: MTV Hits Channel Closure
programme.desc: MTV Hits Channel will close on 30 June 2025. Music fans still have access to our suite of Vevo Music Video channels on internet-connected iQ4/iQ5. Plus, an exciting new lineup of Music Video channels is coming to Foxtel in July.
